Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Generalities on [hSet].  Vladimir Voevodsky. Feb. - Sep. 2011

In this file we introduce the type [hSet] of h-sets, i.e., of types of h-level 2
as well as a number of constructions such as type of (monic) subtypes, images,
surjectivity etc. which, while they formally apply to functions between
arbitrary types actually only depend on the behavior of the function on the sets
of connected components of these types.

While it is possible to write a part of this file in a form which does not
require RR1 it seems like a waste of effort since it would require to repeat a
lot of things twice. Accordingly we assume RR1 from the start in dealing with
sets. The drawback is that all the subsequent files will not compile at the
moment without the Type in Type patch.
*)

(** ** Contents
- The type of sets i.e. of types of h-level 2 in [UU]
 - [hProp] as a set
 - Booleans as a set
- Types [X] which satisfy "weak" axiom of choice for all families
  [P : X -> UU]
- The type of monic subtypes of a type (subsets of the set of connected
  components)
 - General definitions
 - Direct product of two subtypes
 - A subtype with paths between any two elements is an [hProp]
- Relations on types (or equivalently relations on the sets of connected
  components)
 - Relations and boolean relations
 - Standard properties of relations
 - Elementary implications between properties of relations
 - Standard properties of relations and logical equivalences
 - Preorderings, partial orderings, and associated types
 - Equivalence relations and associated types
 - Direct product of two relations
 - Negation of a relation and its properties
 - Boolean representation of decidable equality
 - Boolean representation of decidable relations
 - Restriction of a relation to a subtype
 - Equivalence classes with respect to a given relation
 - Direct product of equivalence classes
- Surjections to sets are epimorphisms
- Epimorphisms are surjections
- Universal property enjoyed by surjections
- Set quotients of types
 - Set quotients defined in terms of equivalence classes
 - Universal property of [setquot R] for functions to sets satisfying
   compatibility condition [iscomprelfun]
 - Functoriality of [setquot] for functions mapping one relation to another
 - Universal property of [setquot] for predicates of one and several variables
 - The case when the function between quotients defined by [setquotfun] is a
   surjection, inclusion or a weak equivalence
 - [setquot] with respect to the product of two relations
 - Universal property of [setquot] for functions of two variables
 - Functoriality of [setquot] for functions of two variables mapping one
   relation to another
 - Set quotients with respect to decidable equivalence relations have decidable
   equality
 - Relations on quotient sets
 - Subtypes of quotients and quotients of subtypes
 - The set of connected components of a type
- Set quotients. Construction 2 (Unfinished)
 - Functions compatible with a relation
 - The quotient set of a type by a relation
 - Universal property of [setquot2 R] for functions to sets satisfying
   compatibility condition [iscomplrelfun]
 - Weak equivalence from [R x x'] to [paths (setquot2pr R x) (setquot2pr R x')]
- Consequences of univalence
*)


(** ** Preamble *)

(** Imports *)

Require Export UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.




(** ** The type of sets i.e. of types of h-level 2 in [UU] *)

Definition hSet : UU := total2 (λ X : UU, isaset X).
Definition make_hSet (X : UU) (i : isaset X) := tpair isaset X i : hSet.
Definition pr1hSet : hSet -> UU := @pr1 UU (λ X : UU, isaset X).
Coercion pr1hSet: hSet >-> UU.

Definition eqset {X : hSet} (x x' : X) : hProp
  := make_hProp (x = x') (pr2 X x x').


Setting b constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ = _ :> _".


Definition neqset {X : hSet} (x x' : X) : hProp
  := make_hProp (x != x') (isapropneg _). (* uses funextemptyAxiom *)

Setting b constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ != _".


Definition setproperty (X : hSet) := pr2 X.


X, Y: hSet
hSet


X, Y: hSet
hSet

  
X, Y: hSet
hSet
 
X, Y: hSet
isaset (X × Y)

  apply (isofhleveldirprod 2); apply setproperty.
Defined.


X, Y: hSet
hSet


X, Y: hSet
hSet

  
X, Y: hSet
hSet
 
X, Y: hSet
isaset (X ⨿ Y)
 apply isasetcoprod; apply setproperty.
Defined.


X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)


X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)

  
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)
 
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
isaset X
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
∏ x : X, isaset (Y x)

  
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
isaset X
 apply setproperty.
  
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
∏ x : X, isaset (Y x)
 
X: hSet
Y: X → hSet
x: X
isaset (Y x)
 apply setproperty.
Defined.

Definition total2_hSet {X : hSet} (Y : X -> hSet) : hSet
  := make_hSet (∑ x, Y x) (isaset_total2_hSet X Y).

Definition hfiber_hSet {X Y : hSet} (f : X → Y) (y : Y) : hSet
  := make_hSet (hfiber f y) (isaset_hfiber f y (pr2 X) (pr2 Y)).


Declare Scope set.
Delimit Scope set with set.

Notation "'∑' x .. y , P" := (total2_hSet (λ x,.. (total2_hSet (λ y, P))..))
  (at level 200, x binder, y binder, right associativity) : set.
  (* type this in emacs in agda-input method with \sum *)


X: UU
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∏ x : X, Y x)


X: UU
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∏ x : X, Y x)

  
X: UU
Y: X → hSet
isaset (∏ x : X, Y x)
 
X: UU
Y: X → hSet
∏ t : X, isaset (Y t)
 
X: UU
Y: X → hSet
x: X
isaset (Y x)
 apply setproperty.
Defined.

Definition forall_hSet {X : UU} (Y : X -> hSet) : hSet
  := make_hSet (∏ x, Y x) (isaset_forall_hSet X Y).

Notation "'∏' x .. y , P" := (forall_hSet (λ x,.. (forall_hSet (λ y, P))..))
  (at level 200, x binder, y binder, right associativity) : set.
  (* type this in emacs in agda-input method with \sum *)

Definition unitset : hSet := make_hSet unit isasetunit.


X, Y: hSet
hSet


X, Y: hSet
hSet

  
X, Y: hSet
isaset (X × Y)

  abstract (exact (isasetdirprod _ _ (setproperty X) (setproperty Y))).
Defined.


Setting B constr at level 75
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ × _".


(** *** [hProp] as a set *)

Definition hPropset : hSet := tpair _ hProp isasethProp.
(* Canonical Structure hPropset. *)

Definition hProp_to_hSet (P : hProp) : hSet
  := make_hSet P (isasetaprop (propproperty P)).

(** *** Booleans as a set *)

Definition boolset : hSet := make_hSet bool isasetbool.
(* Canonical Structure boolset. *)

(* properties of functions between sets *)


X, Y: hSet
f: X → Y
hProp


X, Y: hSet
f: X → Y
hProp

  
X, Y: hSet
f: X → Y
hProp
 
X, Y: hSet
f: X → Y
isaprop (∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x')

  abstract (
      intros; apply impred; intro x; apply impred; intro y;
      apply impred; intro e; apply setproperty)
           using isaprop_isInjectiveFunction.
Defined.


(** ** Types [X] which satisfy "weak" axiom of choice for all families [P : X -> UU]

Weak axiom of choice for [X] is the condition that for any family [P : X -> UU]
over [X] such that all members of the family are inhabited the space of sections
of the family is inhabited. Equivalently one can formulate it as an assertion
that for any surjection (see below) [p : Y -> X] the space of sections of this
surjection i.e. functions [s : X -> Y] together with a homotopy from
[funcomp s p] to [idfun X] is inhabited. It does not provide a choice of a
section for such a family or a surjection. In topos-theoretic semantics this
condition corresponds to "local projectivity" of [X]. It automatically holds
for the point [unit] but need not hold for sub-objects of [unit] i.e. for types
of h-level 1 (propositions). In particular it does not have to hold for general
types with decidable equality.

Intuition based on standard univalent models suggests that any type satisfying
weak axiom of choice is a set. Indeed it seems to be possible to show that if
both a type and the set of connected components of this type (see below)
satisfy weak  axiom of choice then the type is a set. In particular, if one
imposes weak axiom of choice for sets as an axiom then it would follow that
every type satisfying weak axiom of choice is a set. I do not know however if
there are models which would validate a possibility of types other than sets
to satisfy weak axiom of choice.
*)

Definition ischoicebase_uu1 (X : UU)
  := ∏ P : X -> UU, (∏ x : X, ishinh (P x)) -> ishinh (∏ x : X, P x).

(** Uses RR1 *)

X: UU
isaprop (ischoicebase_uu1 X)


X: UU
isaprop (ischoicebase_uu1 X)

  
X: UU
∏ t : X → UU,
isofhlevel 1 ((∏ x : X, ∥ t x ∥) → ∥ ∏ x : X, t x ∥)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
isofhlevel 1 ((∏ x : X, ∥ P x ∥) → ∥ ∏ x : X, P x ∥)
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
(∏ x : X, ∥ P x ∥) → isofhlevel 1 (∥ ∏ x : X, P x ∥)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
fs: ∏ x : X, ∥ P x ∥
isofhlevel 1 (∥ ∏ x : X, P x ∥)
 apply (pr2 (ishinh _)).
Defined.

Definition ischoicebase (X : UU) : hProp := make_hProp _ (isapropischoicebase X).


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
ischoicebase Y


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
ischoicebase Y

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
ischoicebase Y
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
make_hProp (ischoicebase_uu1 Y)
  (isapropischoicebase Y)

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
Q: Y → UU
fs: ∏ x : Y, ∥ Q x ∥
∥ ∏ x : Y, Q x ∥

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase X
Q: Y → UU
fs: ∏ x : Y, ∥ Q x ∥
∥ ∏ x : X, Q (w x) ∥

  apply (is (funcomp w Q) (λ x : X, fs (w x))).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase Y
ischoicebase X


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase Y
ischoicebase X

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: ischoicebase Y
ischoicebase X
 apply (ischoicebaseweqf (invweq w) is).
Defined.


ischoicebase unit


ischoicebase unit

  
make_hProp (ischoicebase_uu1 unit)
  (isapropischoicebase unit)
 
P: unit → UU
fs: ∏ x : unit, ∥ P x ∥
∥ ∏ x : unit, P x ∥

  
P: unit → UU
fs: ∏ x : unit, ∥ P x ∥
∥ P tt ∥

  apply (fs tt).
Defined.

is: iscontr X
ischoicebase X


X: UU
is: iscontr X
ischoicebase X

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
ischoicebase X

  apply (ischoicebaseweqb (weqcontrtounit is) ischoicebaseunit).
Defined.


ischoicebase ∅


ischoicebase ∅

  
make_hProp (ischoicebase_uu1 ∅)
  (isapropischoicebase ∅)
 
P: ∅ → UU
fs: ∏ x : ∅, ∥ P x ∥
∥ ∏ x : ∅, P x ∥

  apply (hinhpr (λ x : empty, fromempty x)).
Defined.

ischoicebase X

is: ¬ X
ischoicebase X

  apply (ischoicebaseweqb (weqtoempty is) ischoicebaseempty).
Defined.

∥ ∏ x : X ⨿ Y, P x ∥

isy: ischoicebase Y

∥ (∏ x : X, P (inl x)) × (∏ y : Y, P (inr y)) ∥

isy: ischoicebase Y

∥ ∏ y : Y, P (inr y) ∥

  
X, Y: UU
isx: ischoicebase X
isy: ischoicebase Y
P: X ⨿ Y → UU
fs: ∏ x : X ⨿ Y, ∥ P x ∥
∥ ∏ y : Y, P (inr y) ∥

  apply (isy _ (λ y : Y, fs (ii2 y))).
Defined.








(** ** The type of monic subtypes of a type (subsets of the set of connected components) *)


(** *** General definitions *)

Definition hsubtype (X : UU) : UU := X -> hProp.
Identity Coercion id_hsubtype :  hsubtype >-> Funclass.
Definition carrier {X : UU} (A : hsubtype X) := total2 A.
Coercion carrier : hsubtype >-> Sortclass.
Definition make_carrier {X : UU} (A : hsubtype X) :
   ∏ t : X, A t → ∑ x : X, A x := tpair A.
Definition pr1carrier {X : UU} (A : hsubtype X) := @pr1 _ _  : carrier A -> X.


X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)


X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)

  
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
isaset (∑ x : X, Y x)
 
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
isaset X
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
∏ x : X, isaset (Y x)

  
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
isaset X
 apply setproperty.
  
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
∏ x : X, isaset (Y x)
 
X: hSet
Y: hsubtype X
x: X
isaset (Y x)
 apply isasetaprop, propproperty.
Defined.

Definition carrier_subset {X : hSet} (Y : hsubtype X) : hSet
  := make_hSet (∑ x, Y x) (isaset_carrier_subset X Y).

Declare Scope subset.
Notation "'∑' x .. y , P"
  := (carrier_subset (λ x,.. (carrier_subset (λ y, P))..))
  (at level 200, x binder, y binder, right associativity) : subset.
  (* type this in emacs in agda-input method with \sum *)

Delimit Scope subset with subset.

isincl (pr1carrier A)

isincl (pr1carrier A)
 apply (isinclpr1 A (λ x : _, pr2 (A x))).
Defined.

isaset (hsubtype X)

  exact isasethProp.
Defined.

Definition totalsubtype (X : UU) : hsubtype X := λ x, htrue.

(** *** Direct product of two subtypes *)

Definition subtypesdirprod {X Y : UU} (A : hsubtype X) (B : hsubtype Y) :
  hsubtype (X × Y) := λ xy : _, hconj (A (pr1 xy)) (B (pr2 xy)).


X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
A × B


X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
A × B

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
A × B

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
A × B
 
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
is:= pr2 xyis: (λ x : X × Y, subtypesdirprod A B x) (pr1 xyis)
A × B

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
is:= pr2 xyis: (λ x : X × Y, subtypesdirprod A B x) (pr1 xyis)
x:= pr1 xy: X
A × B
 
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
is:= pr2 xyis: (λ x : X × Y, subtypesdirprod A B x) (pr1 xyis)
x:= pr1 xy: X
y:= pr2 xy: (λ _ : X, Y) (pr1 xy)
A × B

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
is:= pr2 xyis: A (pr1 (pr1 xyis)) × B (pr2 (pr1 xyis))
x:= pr1 xy: X
y:= pr2 xy: (λ _ : X, Y) (pr1 xy)
A × B
 
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xyis: subtypesdirprod A B
xy:= pr1 xyis: X × Y
is:= pr2 xyis: A (pr1 (pr1 xyis)) × B (pr2 (pr1 xyis))
x:= pr1 xy: X
y:= pr2 xy: Y
A × B

  apply (make_dirprod (tpair A x (pr1 is)) (tpair B y (pr2 is))).
Defined.

subtypesdirprod A B

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xisyis: A × B
xis:= pr1 xisyis: A
yis:= pr2 xisyis: (λ _ : A, B) (pr1 xisyis)
x:= pr1 xis: X
isx:= pr2 xis: A (pr1 xis)
y:= pr1 yis: Y
isy:= pr2 yis: (λ x : Y, B x) (pr1 yis)
subtypesdirprod A B
 
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
xisyis: A × B
xis:= pr1 xisyis: A
yis:= pr2 xisyis: (λ _ : A, B) (pr1 xisyis)
x:= pr1 xis: X
isx:= pr2 xis: A (pr1 xis)
y:= pr1 yis: Y
isy:= pr2 yis: B (pr1 yis)
subtypesdirprod A B

  apply (tpair (subtypesdirprod A B) (make_dirprod x y) (make_dirprod isx isy)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
subtypesdirprod A B ≃ A × B

A: hsubtype X

X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
a: subtypesdirprod A B
g (f a) = a

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
xy: X × Y
is: subtypesdirprod A B xy
g (f (xy,, is)) = xy,, is

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
x: X
y: Y
is: subtypesdirprod A B (x,, y)
g (f ((x,, y),, is)) = (x,, y),, is

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
x: X
y: Y
isx: A (pr1 (x,, y))
isy: B (pr2 (x,, y))
g (f ((x,, y),, isx,, isy)) = (x,, y),, isx,, isy

    apply idpath.
  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
∏ a : A × B, f (g a) = a
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
efg: ∏ a : A × B, f (g a) = a
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
∏ a : A × B, f (g a) = a

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
a: A × B
f (g a) = a

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
xis: A
yis: B
f (g (xis,, yis)) = xis,, yis

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
x: X
isx: A x
yis: B
f (g ((x,, isx),, yis)) = (x,, isx),, yis

    
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
x: X
isx: A x
y: Y
isy: B y
f (g ((x,, isx),, y,, isy)) = (x,, isx),, y,, isy

    apply idpath.
  
X, Y: UU
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
f:= fromdsubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: subtypesdirprod A B → A × B
g:= tosubtypesdirprodcarrier A B: A × B → subtypesdirprod A B
egf: ∏ a : subtypesdirprod A B, g (f a) = a
efg: ∏ a : A × B, f (g a) = a
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.

Defined.



(** *** A subtype with paths between any two elements is an [hProp]. *)

is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
isaprop A

x, x': A
∏ x : X, isaprop (A x)

A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x, x': A
x0: X
isaprop (A x0)

    apply (pr2 (A x0)).
  
X: UU
A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x, x': A
X0: isincl pr1
x = x'

  
X: UU
A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x, x': A
X0: isincl pr1
pr1 x = pr1 x'

  
X: UU
A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x0: X
is0: A x0
x': A
X0: isincl pr1
pr1 (x0,, is0) = pr1 x'

  
X: UU
A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x0: X
is0: A x0
x0': X
is0': A x0'
X0: isincl pr1
pr1 (x0,, is0) = pr1 (x0',, is0')

  
X: UU
A: hsubtype X
is: ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → x1 = x2
x0: X
is0: A x0
x0': X
is0': A x0'
X0: isincl pr1
x0 = x0'

  apply (is x0 x0' is0 is0').
Defined.

e: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x'
w: ∥ X ∥
P:= ∑ y : Y, ∃ x : X, f x = y: Type
y, y': Y
j: X
k: f j = y
j': X
k': f j' = y'
f j = y'

    
X, Y: UU

f: X → Y

w: ∥ X ∥
P:= ∑ y : Y, ∃ x : X, f x = y: Type

k: f j = y
j': X
k': f j' = y'
f j = f j'

 apply idpath.
  
X, Y: UU
is: isaset Y
f: X → Y
e: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x'
w: ∥ X ∥
P:= ∑ y : Y, ∃ x : X, f x = y: Type
j: isaprop P
p: P
Y

  exact (pr1 p).
Defined.

(* End of "the type of monic subtypes of a type". *)







(** ** Relations on types (or equivalently relations on the sets of connected components) *)


(** *** Relations and boolean relations *)

Definition hrel (X : UU) : UU := X -> X -> hProp.
Identity Coercion idhrel : hrel >-> Funclass.

Definition brel (X : UU) : UU := X -> X -> bool.
Identity Coercion idbrel : brel >-> Funclass.

(** *** Standard properties of relations *)



Definition istrans {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ (x1 x2 x3 : X), R x1 x2 -> R x2 x3 -> R x1 x3.

Definition isrefl {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x : X, R x x.

Definition issymm {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ (x1 x2 : X), R x1 x2 -> R x2 x1.

Definition ispreorder {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := istrans R × isrefl R.

Definition iseqrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) := ispreorder R × issymm R.
Definition iseqrelconstr {X : UU} {R : hrel X}
           (trans0 : istrans R) (refl0 : isrefl R) (symm0 : issymm R) :
  iseqrel R := make_dirprod (make_dirprod trans0 refl0) symm0.

Definition isirrefl {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := ∏ x : X, ¬ R x x.

Definition isasymm {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ (x1 x2 : X), R x1 x2 -> R x2 x1 -> empty.

Definition iscoasymm {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := ∏ x1 x2, ¬ R x1 x2 -> R x2 x1.

Definition istotal {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := ∏ x1 x2, R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x1.

Definition isdectotal {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := ∏ x1 x2, R x1 x2 ⨿ R x2 x1.

Definition iscotrans {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2 x3, R x1 x3 -> R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x3.

Definition isdeccotrans {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2 x3, R x1 x3 -> R x1 x2 ⨿ R x2 x3.

Definition isdecrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := ∏ x1 x2, R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ R x1 x2.

Definition isnegrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2, ¬ ¬ R x1 x2 -> R x1 x2.

(** Note that the property of being (co-)antisymmetric is different from other
  properties of relations which we consider due to the presence of [paths] in
  its formulation. As a consequence it behaves differently relative to the
  quotients of types - the quotient relation can be (co-)antisymmetric while
  the original relation was not. *)

Definition isantisymm {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ (x1 x2 : X), R x1 x2 -> R x2 x1 -> x1 = x2.

Definition isPartialOrder {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ispreorder R × isantisymm R.

Ltac unwrap_isPartialOrder i :=
  induction i as [transrefl antisymm]; induction transrefl as [trans refl].

Definition isantisymmneg {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ (x1 x2 : X), ¬ R x1 x2 -> ¬ R x2 x1 -> x1 = x2.

Definition iscoantisymm {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2, ¬ R x1 x2 -> R x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2).

(** Note that the following condition on a relation is different from all the
  other which we have considered since it is not a property but a structure,
  i.e. it is in general unclear whether [isaprop (neqchoice R)] is provable. *)

Definition neqchoice {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2, x1 != x2 -> R x1 x2 ⨿ R x2 x1.

(** proofs that the properties are propositions  *)


X: hSet
R: hrel X
isaprop (istrans R)


X: hSet
R: hrel X
isaprop (istrans R)

  
X: hSet
R: hrel X
isaprop (istrans R)
 
X: hSet
R: hrel X
t, t0, t1: X
t2: R t t0
t3: R t0 t1
isofhlevel 1 (R t t1)
 apply propproperty.
Defined.


X: hSet
R: hrel X
isaprop (isrefl R)


X: hSet
R: hrel X
isaprop (isrefl R)

R: hrel X
isaprop (isrefl R)
 
X: hSet
R: hrel X
t: X
isofhlevel 1 (R t t)
 apply propproperty.
Defined.

R: hrel X
isaprop (istotal R)


X: hSet

isaprop (istotal R)

isaprop (istotal R)

isaprop (∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x1)

R: hrel X
x: X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x2 : X, R x x2 ∨ R x2 x)

isofhlevel 1 (R x y ∨ R y x)

  apply propproperty.
Defined.


X: hSet

isaprop (isantisymm R)

x: X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x2 : X, R x x2 → R x2 x → x = x2)
 
X: hSet

isofhlevel 1 (R x y → R y x → x = y)

x, y: X
r: R x y
isofhlevel 1 (R y x → x = y)
 
X: hSet
R: hrel X
x, y: X
r: R x y
s: R y x
isofhlevel 1 (x = y)
 apply setproperty.
Defined.

isaprop (ispreorder R)

 apply isaprop_istrans.

isaprop (isrefl R)
 apply isaprop_isrefl. }
Defined.

 apply isaprop_isantisymm. }
Defined.

(** the relations on a set form a set *)


X: hSet
isaset (hrel X)

  
X: hSet
isaset (hrel X)
 
X: hSet
isaset (X → X → hProp)

  
X: hSet
x: X
isaset (X → hProp)

  
X: hSet
x, y: X
isaset hProp

  exact isasethProp.
Defined.

(** *** Elementary implications between properties of relations *)


X: UU
R: hrel X
is1: istrans R
is2: isirrefl R
isasymm R


X: UU
R: hrel X
is1: istrans R
is2: isirrefl R
isasymm R

R: hrel X
is1: istrans R
is2: isirrefl R
isasymm R
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
is1: istrans R
is2: isirrefl R
a, b: X
rab: R a b
rba: R b a
∅
 apply (is2 _ (is1 _ _ _ rab rba)).
Defined.

R: hrel X
is: istotal R
iscoasymm R

is: istotal R

¬ R x1 x2 → R x2 x1
 apply (hdisjtoimpl (is _ _)).
Defined.

isnegrel R

R x1 x2

¬ ¬ R x1 x2 → R x1 x2

 induction (nnr nr).

nr: ¬ R x2 x1

Defined.

a != b

∅

R: hrel X
is: isirrefl R
a, b: X
r: R b b
e: a = b
∅
 apply (is b r).
Defined.


(** *** Standard properties of relations and logical equivalences *)

Definition hrellogeq {X : UU} (L R : hrel X) : UU
  := ∏ x1 x2, (L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2).


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istrans L
istrans R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istrans L
istrans R

  
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istrans L
istrans R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istrans L
x1, x2, x3: X
r12: R x1 x2
r23: R x2 x3
R x1 x3

  apply ((pr1 (lg _ _)) (isl _ _ _ ((pr2 (lg _ _)) r12) ((pr2 (lg _ _)) r23))).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isrefl L
isrefl R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isrefl L
isrefl R

  
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isrefl L
isrefl R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isrefl L
x: X
R x x
 apply (pr1 (lg _ _) (isl x)).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: issymm L
issymm R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: issymm L
issymm R

  
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: issymm L
issymm R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: issymm L
x1, x2: X
r12: R x1 x2
R x2 x1

  apply (pr1 (lg _ _) (isl _ _ (pr2 (lg _ _) r12))).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: ispreorder L
ispreorder R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X

ispreorder R

  
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: ispreorder L
ispreorder R

  apply (make_dirprod (istranslogeqf lg (pr1 isl)) (isrefllogeqf lg (pr2 isl))).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: iseqrel L
iseqrel R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X

L, R: hrel X

isl: iseqrel L
iseqrel R

  apply (make_dirprod (ispologeqf lg (pr1 isl)) (issymmlogeqf lg (pr2 isl))).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isirrefl L
isirrefl R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X

X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isirrefl L
isirrefl R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isirrefl L
x: X
r: R x x
∅
 apply (isl _ (pr2 (lg x x) r)).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isasymm L
isasymm R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isasymm L
isasymm R

  
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isasymm L
isasymm R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: isasymm L
x1, x2: X
r12: R x1 x2
r21: R x2 x1
∅

  apply (isl _ _ (pr2 (lg _ _) r12) (pr2 (lg _ _) r21)).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: iscoasymm L
iscoasymm R


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: iscoasymm L

X: UU
L, R: hrel X

isl: iscoasymm L
iscoasymm R
 
X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: iscoasymm L
x1, x2: X
r12: ¬ R x1 x2
R x2 x1

  apply ((pr1 (lg _ _)) (isl _ _ (negf (pr1 (lg _ _)) r12))).
Defined.


X: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istotal L
istotal R

L, R: hrel X
lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: istotal L
x1, x2: X
R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x1

isl: istotal L

R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x1

→ ishinh_UU (R x1 x2 ⨿ R x2 x1)

  apply (coprodf (pr1 (lg x1 x2)) (pr1 (lg x2 x1))).
Defined.

lg: ∏ x1 x2 : X, L x1 x2 <-> R x1 x2
isl: neqchoice L
x1, x2: X
ne: x1 != x2
R x1 x2 ⨿ R x2 x1

  apply (coprodf (pr1 (lg x1 x2)) (pr1 (lg x2 x1)) (isl _ _ ne)).
Defined.



(** *** Preorderings, partial orderings, and associated types. *)

(* preoderings *)
Definition po (X : UU) : UU := ∑ R : hrel X, ispreorder R.
Definition make_po {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (is : ispreorder R) : po X
  := tpair ispreorder R is.
Definition carrierofpo (X : UU) : po X -> (X -> X -> hProp) := @pr1 _ ispreorder.
Coercion carrierofpo : po >-> Funclass.

Definition PreorderedSet : UU := ∑ X : hSet, po X.
Definition PreorderedSetPair (X : hSet) (R :po X) : PreorderedSet
  := tpair _ X R.
Definition carrierofPreorderedSet : PreorderedSet -> hSet := pr1.
Coercion carrierofPreorderedSet : PreorderedSet >-> hSet.
Definition PreorderedSetRelation (X : PreorderedSet) : hrel X := pr1 (pr2 X).

(* partial orderings *)
Definition PartialOrder (X : hSet) : UU := ∑ R : hrel X, isPartialOrder R.
Definition make_PartialOrder {X : hSet} (R : hrel X) (is : isPartialOrder R) :
  PartialOrder X
  := tpair isPartialOrder R is.
Definition carrierofPartialOrder {X : hSet} : PartialOrder X -> hrel X := pr1.
Coercion carrierofPartialOrder : PartialOrder >-> hrel.

Definition Poset : UU := ∑ X, PartialOrder X.
Definition make_Poset (X : hSet) (R : PartialOrder X) : Poset
  := tpair PartialOrder X R.
Definition carrierofposet : Poset -> hSet := pr1.
Coercion carrierofposet : Poset >-> hSet.
Definition posetRelation (X : Poset) : hrel X := pr1 (pr2 X).


X: Poset
isrefl (posetRelation X)


X: Poset
isrefl (posetRelation X)

  
X: Poset
x: X
posetRelation X x x
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 X))) x).
Defined.


X: Poset
istrans (posetRelation X)


X: Poset
istrans (posetRelation X)

  
X: Poset
x, y, z: X
l: posetRelation X x y
m: posetRelation X y z
posetRelation X x z
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 X))) x y z l m).
Defined.


X: Poset
isantisymm (posetRelation X)


X: Poset
isantisymm (posetRelation X)

  
X: Poset
x, y: X
l: posetRelation X x y
m: posetRelation X y x
x = y
 exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 X)) x y l m).
Defined.

Declare Scope poset.
Delimit Scope poset with poset.
Notation "m ≤ n" := (posetRelation _ m n) (no associativity, at level 70) :
                      poset.
Definition isaposetmorphism {X Y : Poset} (f : X -> Y)
  := (∏ x x' : X, x ≤ x' -> f x ≤ f x')%poset.
Definition posetmorphism (X Y : Poset) : UU
  := total2 (fun f : X -> Y => isaposetmorphism f).
Definition make_posetmorphism (X Y : Poset) :
  ∏ t : X → Y, isaposetmorphism t → ∑ f : X → Y, isaposetmorphism f
  := tpair (fun f : X -> Y => isaposetmorphism f).
Definition carrierofposetmorphism (X Y : Poset) : posetmorphism X Y -> (X -> Y)
  := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion carrierofposetmorphism : posetmorphism >-> Funclass.

Definition isdec_ordering (X : Poset) : UU
  := ∏ (x y : X), decidable (x ≤ y)%poset.


X, Y: Poset
f: X → Y
isaprop (isaposetmorphism f)


X, Y: Poset
f: X → Y
isaprop (isaposetmorphism f)

  
X, Y: Poset
f: X → Y
isaprop (isaposetmorphism f)
 
X, Y: Poset
f: X → Y
t, t': X
isofhlevel 1 ((t ≤ t')%poset → (f t ≤ f t')%poset)
 apply impred_prop.
Defined.

(** the preorders on a set form a set *)


X: hSet
isaset (po X)

  
X: hSet
isaset (po X)

  
X: hSet
isaset (∑ R : hrel X, ispreorder R)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (hrel X)
X: hSet
∏ x : hrel X, isofhlevel 2 (ispreorder x)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (hrel X)
 apply isaset_hrel. 
X: hSet
∏ x : hrel X, isofhlevel 2 (ispreorder x)

  
X: hSet
x: hrel X
isofhlevel 2 (ispreorder x)
 
X: hSet
x: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (ispreorder x)
 apply isaprop_ispreorder.
Defined.

(** the partial orders on a set form a set *)


X: hSet
isaset (PartialOrder X)

  
X: hSet
isaset (PartialOrder X)

  
X: hSet
isaset (∑ R : hrel X, isPartialOrder R)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (hrel X)
X: hSet
∏ x : hrel X, isofhlevel 2 (isPartialOrder x)

  
X: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (hrel X)
 apply isaset_hrel. 
X: hSet
∏ x : hrel X, isofhlevel 2 (isPartialOrder x)

  
X: hSet
x: hrel X
isofhlevel 2 (isPartialOrder x)
 
X: hSet
x: hrel X
isofhlevel 1 (isPartialOrder x)
 apply isaprop_isPartialOrder.
Defined.

(** poset equivalences *)

Definition isPosetEquivalence {X Y : Poset} (f : X ≃ Y) :=
  isaposetmorphism f × isaposetmorphism (invmap f).


X, Y: Poset
f: X ≃ Y
isaprop (isPosetEquivalence f)


X, Y: Poset
f: X ≃ Y
isaprop (isPosetEquivalence f)

  
X, Y: Poset
f: X ≃ Y
isaprop (isPosetEquivalence f)
 
X, Y: Poset
f: X ≃ Y
isaprop
  (isaposetmorphism f × isaposetmorphism (invmap f))

  apply isapropdirprod; apply isaprop_isaposetmorphism.
Defined.


X: Poset
isPosetEquivalence (idweq X)


X: Poset
isPosetEquivalence (idweq X)

  
X: Poset
isPosetEquivalence (idweq X)
 
X: Poset
isaposetmorphism (idweq X)
X: Poset
isaposetmorphism (invmap (idweq X))

  
X: Poset
isaposetmorphism (idweq X)
 
X: Poset
x, y: X
le: (x ≤ y)%poset
(idweq X x ≤ idweq X y)%poset
 exact le.
  
X: Poset
isaposetmorphism (invmap (idweq X))
 
X: Poset
x, y: X
le: (x ≤ y)%poset
(invmap (idweq X) x ≤ invmap (idweq X) y)%poset
 exact le.
Defined.

Definition PosetEquivalence (X Y : Poset) : UU
  := ∑ f : X ≃ Y, isPosetEquivalence f.

Local Open Scope poset.
Notation "X ≅ Y" := (PosetEquivalence X Y) (at level 60, no associativity) :
                      poset.
(* written \cong in Agda input method *)

Definition posetUnderlyingEquivalence {X Y : Poset} : X ≅ Y -> X ≃ Y := pr1.
Coercion posetUnderlyingEquivalence : PosetEquivalence >-> weq.


X: Poset
X ≅ X


X: Poset
X ≅ X

  
X: Poset
X ≅ X
 
X: Poset
isPosetEquivalence (idweq X)
 apply isPosetEquivalence_idweq.
Defined.


X, Y: Poset
isincl (pr1 : X ≅ Y → X ≃ Y)


X, Y: Poset
isincl (pr1 : X ≅ Y → X ≃ Y)

  
X, Y: Poset
isincl (pr1 : X ≅ Y → X ≃ Y)
 
X, Y: Poset
∏ x : X ≃ Y, isaprop (isPosetEquivalence x)
 apply isaprop_isPosetEquivalence.
Defined.


X, Y: Poset
isInjective (pr1 : X ≅ Y → X ≃ Y)


X, Y: Poset
isInjective (pr1 : X ≅ Y → X ≃ Y)

  
X, Y: Poset
f, g: X ≅ Y
isweq (maponpaths pr1)
 
X, Y: Poset
f, g: X ≅ Y
isincl pr1
 apply isincl_pr1_PosetEquivalence.
Defined.

(** poset concepts *)

Notation "m < n" := (m ≤ n × m != n)%poset (only parsing) : poset.
Definition isMinimal {X : Poset} (x : X) : UU := ∏ y, x ≤ y.
Definition isMaximal {X : Poset} (x : X) : UU := ∏ y, y ≤ x.
Definition consecutive {X : Poset} (x y : X) : UU
  := x < y × ∏ z, ¬ (x < z × z < y).


X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)


X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)

  
X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)
 
X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (∏ y : X, y ≤ x)
 apply impred_prop.
Defined.


X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)


X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)

  
X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (isMaximal x)
 
X: Poset
x: X
isaprop (∏ y : X, y ≤ x)
 apply impred_prop.
Defined.


X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop (consecutive x y)


X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop (consecutive x y)

  
X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop (consecutive x y)
 
X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop
  ((x ≤ y × x != y)
   × (∏ z : X, ¬ ((x ≤ z × x != z) × z ≤ y × z != y)))

X: Poset

  (∏ z : X, ¬ ((x ≤ z × x != z) × z ≤ y × z != y))

isaprop (x ≤ y)
X: Poset

isaprop (x != y)
 
X: Poset

isaprop (x ≤ y)
 apply pr2. 
X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop (x != y)
 
X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop (x != y)
 apply isapropneg.
  
X: Poset
x, y: X
isaprop
  (∏ z : X, ¬ ((x ≤ z × x != z) × z ≤ y × z != y))
 
X: Poset
x, y, z: X
isofhlevel 1 (¬ ((x ≤ z × x != z) × z ≤ y × z != y))
 apply isapropneg.
Defined.

(** *** Eqivalence relations and associated types. *)

Definition eqrel (X : UU) : UU := total2 (λ R : hrel X, iseqrel R).
Definition make_eqrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (is : iseqrel R) : eqrel X
  := tpair (λ R : hrel X, iseqrel R) R is.
Definition eqrelconstr {X : UU} (R : hrel X)
           (is1 : istrans R) (is2 : isrefl R) (is3 : issymm R) : eqrel X
  := make_eqrel R (make_dirprod (make_dirprod is1 is2) is3).
Definition pr1eqrel (X : UU) : eqrel X -> (X -> (X -> hProp)) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1eqrel : eqrel >-> Funclass.

Definition eqreltrans {X : UU} (R : eqrel X) : istrans R := pr1 (pr1 (pr2 R)).
Definition eqrelrefl {X : UU} (R : eqrel X) : isrefl R := pr2 (pr1 (pr2 R)).
Definition eqrelsymm {X : UU} (R : eqrel X) : issymm R := pr2 (pr2 R).



(** *** Direct product of two relations *)

Definition hreldirprod {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y) :
  hrel (X × Y)
  := λ xy xy' : dirprod X Y, hconj (RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy'))
                                    (RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')).

Definition istransdirprod {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y)
           (isx : istrans RX) (isy : istrans RY) :
  istrans (hreldirprod RX RY)
  := λ xy1 xy2 xy3 : _,
       λ is12 : _ ,
         λ is23 : _,
           make_dirprod (isx _ _ _ (pr1 is12) (pr1 is23))
                       (isy _ _ _ (pr2 is12) (pr2 is23)).

Definition isrefldirprod {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y)
           (isx : isrefl RX) (isy : isrefl RY) : isrefl (hreldirprod RX RY)
  := λ xy : _, make_dirprod (isx _) (isy _).

Definition issymmdirprod {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y)
           (isx : issymm RX) (isy : issymm RY) : issymm (hreldirprod RX RY)
  := λ xy1 xy2 : _, λ is12 : _, make_dirprod (isx _ _ (pr1 is12))
                                              (isy _ _ (pr2 is12)).

Definition eqreldirprod {X Y : UU} (RX : eqrel X) (RY : eqrel Y) :
  eqrel (X × Y)
  := eqrelconstr (hreldirprod RX RY)
                 (istransdirprod _ _ (eqreltrans RX) (eqreltrans RY))
                 (isrefldirprod  _ _ (eqrelrefl RX) (eqrelrefl RY))
                 (issymmdirprod  _ _ (eqrelsymm RX) (eqrelsymm RY)).


(** *** Negation of a relation and its properties *)

Definition negrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : hrel X
  := λ x x', make_hProp (¬ R x x') (isapropneg _). (* uses [funextemptyAxiom] *)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscotrans R
istrans (negrel R)

(* uses [funextfun] and [funextemptyAxiom] *)

X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscotrans R
istrans (negrel R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscotrans R
istrans (negrel R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscotrans R
x1, x2, x3: X
r12: negrel R x1 x2
r23: negrel R x2 x3
negrel R x1 x3

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscotrans R
x1, x2, x3: X
r12: negrel R x1 x2
r23: negrel R x2 x3
¬ (R x1 x2 ∨ R x2 x3)

  apply (toneghdisj (make_dirprod r12 r23)).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscoasymm R
isasymm (negrel R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscoasymm R
isasymm (negrel R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscoasymm R
isasymm (negrel R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: iscoasymm R
x1, x2: X
r12: negrel R x1 x2
r21: negrel R x2 x1
∅
 apply (r21 (isr _ _ r12)).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isasymm R
iscoasymm (negrel R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isasymm R
iscoasymm (negrel R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isasymm R
iscoasymm (negrel R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isasymm R
x1, x2: X
nr12: ¬ negrel R x1 x2
negrel R x2 x1
 apply (negf (isr _ _) nr12).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
isdecrel (negrel R)

(* uses [funextemptyAxiom] *)

X: UU

isr: isdecrel R

isdecrel (negrel R)

isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
negrel R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ negrel R x1 x2

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
r: R x1 x2
negrel R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ negrel R x1 x2
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
nr: ¬ R x1 x2
negrel R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ negrel R x1 x2

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
r: R x1 x2
negrel R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ negrel R x1 x2
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
r: R x1 x2
¬ negrel R x1 x2
 apply (todneg _ r).
  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isdecrel R
x1, x2: X
nr: ¬ R x1 x2
negrel R x1 x2 ⨿ ¬ negrel R x1 x2
 apply (ii1 nr).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isnegrel (negrel R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isnegrel (negrel R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isnegrel (negrel R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
x1, x2: X
¬ ¬ negrel R x1 x2 → negrel R x1 x2

  apply (negf (todneg (R x1 x2))).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymm (negrel R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymm (negrel R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isr: isantisymmneg R
isantisymm (negrel R)
 apply isr.
Defined.

(** *** Boolean representation of decidable equality *)

Definition eqh {X : UU} (is : isdeceq X) : hrel X
  := λ x x', make_hProp (booleq is x x' = true)
                        (isasetbool (booleq is x x') true).

Definition neqh {X : UU} (is : isdeceq X) : hrel X
  := λ x x', make_hProp (booleq is x x' = false)
                        (isasetbool (booleq is x x') false).


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isrefl (eqh is)


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isrefl (eqh is)

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isrefl (eqh is)
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isrefl
  (λ x x' : X,
   make_hProp (booleq is x x' = true)
     (isasetbool (booleq is x x') true))
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
isrefl
  (λ x x' : X,
   make_hProp
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
        (is x x') = true)
     (isasetbool
        (coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
           (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
           (is x x')) true))

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
     (is x x) = true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
        (is x x)) true)
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
e: x = x
make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inl e) =
   true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
        (inl e)) true)
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
ne: x != x
make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
     (inr ne) = true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
        (inr ne)) true)

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
e: x = x
make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inl e) =
   true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
        (inl e)) true)
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
e: x = x
true = true
 apply idpath.
  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x: X
ne: x != x
make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
     (inr ne) = true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false)
        (inr ne)) true)
 induction (ne (idpath x)).
Defined.

x, x': X
x = x' ≃ eqh is x x'

x, x': X
x = x' ≃ eqh is x x'

x = x' ≃ eqh is x x'

x, x': X
x = x' → eqh is x x'

x, x': X
eqh is x x' → x = x'

x, x': X
isaprop (x = x')

isaprop (eqh is x x')

  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect

        (λ _ : x = x', true)
        (λ _ : x != x', false) (inr ne')) true)
x = x'

x, x': X
e': x = x'
e: make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
     (inl e') = true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)

        (λ _ : x != x', false) (inl e')) true)
x = x'
 apply e'.

x, x': X
ne': x != x'
e: make_hProp
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
     (inr ne') = true)
  (isasetbool
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
        (λ _ : x = x', true)
        (λ _ : x != x', false) (inr ne')) true)
x = x'
 induction (nopathsfalsetotrue e).

X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
isaprop
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
     (is x x') = false)
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 1
  (coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
     (is x x') = false)
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
∏
x0
 x'0 : coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x x') = false, iscontr (x0 = x'0)
 apply (isasetbool _ false).
Defined.




(** *** Boolean representation of decidable relations *)


Definition decrel (X : UU) : UU := total2 (λ R : hrel X, isdecrel R).
Definition pr1decrel (X : UU) : decrel X -> hrel X := @pr1 _ _.
Definition make_decrel {X : UU} {R : hrel X} (is : isdecrel R) : decrel X
  := tpair _ R is.
Coercion pr1decrel : decrel >-> hrel.


X: UU
R: decrel X
brel X


X: UU
R: decrel X
brel X

  
X: UU
R: decrel X
brel X
 
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
bool
 
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
a: pr1 R x x'
bool
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
b: ¬ pr1 R x x'
bool

  
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
a: pr1 R x x'
bool
 apply true.
  
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
b: ¬ pr1 R x x'
bool
 apply false.
Defined.

Definition breltodecrel {X : UU} (B : brel X) : decrel X
  := @make_decrel _ (λ x x', make_hProp ((B x x') = true) (isasetbool _ _))
                 (λ x x', (isdeceqbool _ _)).


X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel R x x' = true
R x x'


X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel R x x' = true
R x x'

R: decrel X
x, x': X
e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false) (pr2 R x x') = true
R x x'

R: decrel X
x, x': X
e': pr1 R x x'
e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false) (inl e') = true
R x x'
X: UU
R: decrel X
x, x': X
ne: ¬ pr1 R x x'
e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false) (inr ne) = true
R x x'

e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false) (inl e') = true
R x x'
 apply e'.

e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false) (inr ne) = true
R x x'
 induction (nopathsfalsetotrue e).
Defined.

  (inl r') = true
 apply idpath.

  (inr nr) = true
 induction (nr r).
Defined.

  (λ _ : pr1 R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 R x x', false)
  (inr nr') = false
 apply idpath.
Defined.


(** The following construction of "ct" ("canonical term") is inspired by the
  ideas of George Gonthier. The expression [ct (R, x, y)] where [R] is in
  [hrel X] for some [X] and has a canonical structure of a decidable relation
  and [x, y] are closed terms of type [X] such that [R x y] is inhabited is the
  term of type [R x y] which relizes the canonical term in [isdecrel R x y].

  Definition pathstor_comp {X : UU} (R : decrel X) (x x' : X)
  (e : (decreltobrel R x x') = true) : R x x'.
  Proof. unfold decreltobrel. intros.  induction (pr2 R x x') as [ e' | ne ].
  apply e'. induction (nopathsfalsetotrue e).
Defined.

  Notation " 'ct' (R, x, y) " := ((pathstor_comp _ x y (idpath true)) : R x y)
                                 (at level 70).

*)


X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (make_decrel is) x x' = true
R x x'


X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (make_decrel is) x x' = true
R x x'

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
e: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 (make_decrel is) x x'
         ⨿ ¬ pr1 (make_decrel is) x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 (make_decrel is) x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 (make_decrel is) x x', false)
  (pr2 (make_decrel is) x x') = true
R x x'
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (is x x') = true
R x x'

x, x': X
e': R x x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inl e') = true
R x x'
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
ne: ¬ R x x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inr ne) = true
R x x'

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
e': R x x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inl e') = true
R x x'
 apply e'.
  
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: isdecrel R
x, x': X
ne: ¬ R x x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inr ne) = true
R x x'
 induction (nopathsfalsetotrue e).
Defined.


Identifier 'ct' now a keyword


(*

  Tactics for computing with decidable relations

  A tactic alternative to [ct], with negation

  If [R x y] is a decidable relation on a type [X], then, by definition, we have a proof [d] of [R x
  y ⨿ ¬ R x y].  If [x] and [y] are constants (definable in an empty context), then simplification
  of [d] will yield either a term of the form [inl p] or [inr q], depending on whether [R x y] is
  true or false.  Let us suppose the answer turns out to be true.  Then if our current proof goal is
  [R x y], then we can automate the proof by first converting [R] to a binary relation [S], so that
  [S x y] simplifies to [true].  Then we know that a proof of [S x y = true] is [idpath true], and
  we can convert that into a proof of [R x y] using a proof of the implication [S x y = true → R x
  y].  Similarly, if the answer turns out to be false, then we know that a proof of [S x y = false]
  is [idpath false], and we can convert that into a proof of [¬ R x y].

  The tactics [confirm_equal] and [confirm_not_equal] make this strategy concise when the goal is of
  the form [x = y] or [x != y] and we have a proof [i] that equality is decidable.

  (It would be redundant to also have a proof that inequality is decidable.)

  To evaluate whether having a tactic simplifies things, compare the proofs of [hzbooleqisi] and
  [hzbooleqisi'] in Integers.v.

 *)


X: UU
isdeceq X → decrel X


X: UU
isdeceq X → decrel X

  
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
decrel X
 
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
hrel X
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
isdecrel ?R

       
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
hrel X
 
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, y: X
hProp
 
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, y: X
isaprop (x = y)
 
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, y: X
isdeceq X
 assumption.
       
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
isdecrel
  ((λ x y : X, (x = y),, isasetifdeceq X i x y)
   :
   hrel X)
 exact i.
Defined.


X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = true
x = x'


X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = true
x = x'

  
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = true
x = x'

  exact (pathstor (deceq_to_decrel i) _ _ e).
Defined.


X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = false
x != x'


X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = false
x != x'

  
X: UU
i: isdeceq X
x, x': X
e: decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel i) x x' = false
x != x'

  exact (pathstonegr (deceq_to_decrel i) _ _ e).
Defined.

(* I don't know why exact_op works better here, but with "exact", the code in RealNumbers/Prelim.v breaks *)
Ltac confirm_yes      d x y := exact_op (pathstor d x y (idpath true)).
Ltac confirm_no       d x y := exact_op (pathstonegr d x y (idpath false)).
Ltac confirm_equal        i := match goal with |- ?x = ?y => confirm_yes (deceq_to_decrel i) x y end.
Ltac confirm_not_equal    i := match goal with |- ?x != ?y => confirm_no (deceq_to_decrel i) x y end.
Ltac confirm_equal_absurd i := match goal with |- ?x = ?y → ∅ => confirm_no (deceq_to_decrel i) x y end.

(** *** Restriction of a relation to a subtype *)

Definition resrel {X : UU} (L : hrel X) (P : hsubtype X) : hrel P
  := λ p1 p2, L (pr1 p1) (pr1 p2).


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: istrans L
istrans (resrel L P)


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: istrans L
istrans (resrel L P)

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: istrans L
istrans (resrel L P)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: istrans L
x1, x2, x3: P
r12: resrel L P x1 x2
r23: resrel L P x2 x3
resrel L P x1 x3

  apply (isl _ (pr1 x2) _ r12 r23).
Defined.

L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isrefl L
isrefl (resrel L P)

 apply isl.
Defined.

isnegrel (resrel L P)

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isnegrel L
isnegrel (resrel L P)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isnegrel L
x1, x2: P
nnr: ¬ ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
resrel L P x1 x2
 apply (isl _ _ nnr).
Defined.


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymm L
isantisymm (resrel L P)


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymm L
isantisymm (resrel L P)

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymm L
isantisymm (resrel L P)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: resrel L P x1 x2
r21: resrel L P x2 x1
x1 = x2

  apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclpr1carrier _) _ _ (isl _ _ r12 r21)).
Defined.


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymmneg L
isantisymmneg (resrel L P)

isl: isantisymmneg L

L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: isantisymmneg L
x1, x2: P
nr12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
nr21: ¬ resrel L P x2 x1
x1 = x2

  apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclpr1carrier _) _ _ (isl _ _ nr12 nr21)).
Defined.


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
iscoantisymm (resrel L P)

isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
resrel L P x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
l: L (pr1 x2) (pr1 x1)
resrel L P x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2)
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
e: pr1 x1 = pr1 x2
resrel L P x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2)

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
l: L (pr1 x2) (pr1 x1)
resrel L P x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2)
 apply (ii1 l).
  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
e: pr1 x1 = pr1 x2
resrel L P x2 x1 ⨿ (x1 = x2)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: iscoantisymm L
x1, x2: P
r12: ¬ resrel L P x1 x2
e: pr1 x1 = pr1 x2
x1 = x2
 apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclpr1carrier _) _ _ e).
Defined.


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: neqchoice L
neqchoice (resrel L P)


X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: neqchoice L
neqchoice (resrel L P)

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: neqchoice L
neqchoice (resrel L P)
 
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: neqchoice L
x1, x2: P
ne: x1 != x2
resrel L P x1 x2 ⨿ resrel L P x2 x1

  
X: UU
L: hrel X
P: hsubtype X
isl: neqchoice L
x1, x2: P
ne: x1 != x2
int:= negf
  (invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
     (isinclpr1carrier P) x1 x2) ne: pr1carrier P x1 != pr1carrier P x2
resrel L P x1 x2 ⨿ resrel L P x2 x1

  apply (isl _ _ int).
Defined.



(** *** Equivalence classes with respect to a given relation *)



Definition iseqclass {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (A : hsubtype X) : UU
  := dirprod (ishinh (carrier A))
             (dirprod (∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 -> A x1 -> A x2)
                      (∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 ->  A x2 -> R x1 x2)).
Definition iseqclassconstr {X : UU} (R : hrel X) {A : hsubtype X}
           (ax0 : ishinh (carrier A))
           (ax1 : ∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 -> A x1 -> A x2)
           (ax2 : ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 ->  A x2 -> R x1 x2) : iseqclass R A
  := make_dirprod ax0 (make_dirprod ax1 ax2).

Definition eqax0 {X : UU} {R : hrel X} {A : hsubtype X} :
  iseqclass R A -> ishinh (carrier A) := λ is : iseqclass R A, pr1 is.
Definition eqax1 {X : UU} {R : hrel X} {A : hsubtype X} :
  iseqclass R A -> ∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 -> A x1 -> A x2
  := λ is : iseqclass R A, pr1 (pr2 is).
Definition eqax2 {X : UU} {R : hrel X} {A : hsubtype X} :
  iseqclass R A -> ∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 -> A x2 -> R x1 x2
  := λ is : iseqclass R A, pr2 (pr2 is).


X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (iseqclass R A)


X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isaprop (iseqclass R A)


X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∥ A ∥)
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1
  ((∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 → A x1 → A x2)
   × (∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → R x1 x2))


X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∥ A ∥)
 exact (isapropishinh (carrier A)).

X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1
  ((∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 → A x1 → A x2)
   × (∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → R x1 x2))
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 → A x1 → A x2)
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → R x1 x2)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x1 x2 : X, R x1 x2 → A x1 → A x2)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
t, t0: X
t1: R t t0
t2: A t
isofhlevel 1 (A t0)

    exact (pr2 (A t0)).
  
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
isofhlevel 1 (∏ x1 x2 : X, A x1 → A x2 → R x1 x2)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
A: hsubtype X
t, t0: X
t1: A t
t2: A t0
isofhlevel 1 (R t t0)

    exact (pr2 (R t t0)).
Defined.


(** *** Direct product of equivalence classes *)


X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
iseqclass (hreldirprod R Q) (subtypesdirprod A B)


X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
iseqclass (hreldirprod R Q) (subtypesdirprod A B)

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
iseqclass (hreldirprod R Q) (subtypesdirprod A B)

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
iseqclass (hreldirprod R Q) (subtypesdirprod A B)

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
iseqclass (hreldirprod R Q) AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
iseqclass RQ AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
iseqclass RQ AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
iseqclass RQ AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2

    
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
xy1, xy2: XY
rq: RQ xy1 xy2
ab1: AB xy1
AB xy2

    apply (make_dirprod (eqax1 isa _ _ (pr1 rq) (pr1 ab1))
                       (eqax1 isb _ _ (pr2 rq) (pr2 ab1))).
  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
iseqclass RQ AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, AB xy1 → AB xy2 → RQ xy1 xy2
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
ax2: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, AB xy1 → AB xy2 → RQ xy1 xy2
iseqclass RQ AB

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, AB xy1 → AB xy2 → RQ xy1 xy2

    
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
xy1, xy2: XY
ab1: AB xy1
ab2: AB xy2
RQ xy1 xy2

    apply (make_dirprod (eqax2 isa _ _ (pr1 ab1) (pr1 ab2))
                       (eqax2 isb _ _ (pr2 ab1) (pr2 ab2))).
  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
Q: hrel Y
A: hsubtype X
B: hsubtype Y
isa: iseqclass R A
isb: iseqclass Q B
XY:= X × Y: Type
AB:= subtypesdirprod A B: hsubtype (X × Y)
RQ:= hreldirprod R Q: hrel (X × Y)
ax0:= ishinhsubtypedirprod A B (eqax0 isa) (eqax0 isb): ∥ subtypesdirprod A B ∥
ax1: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, RQ xy1 xy2 → AB xy1 → AB xy2
ax2: ∏ xy1 xy2 : XY, AB xy1 → AB xy2 → RQ xy1 xy2
iseqclass RQ AB

  apply (iseqclassconstr _ ax0 ax1 ax2).
Defined.



(** ** Surjections to sets are epimorphisms  *)


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: issurjective f
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
∏ y : Y, g1 y = g2 y


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: issurjective f
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
∏ y : Y, g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: issurjective f
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: issurjective f
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y

    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
X1: hfiber f y
g1 y = g2 y
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
t: X
x: f t = y
g1 y = g2 y
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
t: X
P1:= make_hProp (g1 (f t) = g2 (f t))
  (is2 (g1 (f t)) (g2 (f t))): hProp
g1 (f t) = g2 (f t)
 apply (isf t).
  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
g1 y = g2 y

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
g1 y = g2 y → make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) is3
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
g1 y = g2 y → make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) is3
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
X1: g1 y = g2 y
make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) is3
 assumption.
  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g1, g2: Y → Z
is1: ∏ y : Y, ∥ hfiber f y ∥
is2: isaset Z
isf: ∏ x : X, g1 (f x) = g2 (f x)
y: Y
P1:= make_hProp (g1 y = g2 y) (is2 (g1 y) (g2 y)): hProp
s1: hfiber f y → g1 y = g2 y
s2: ∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
is3:= is2 (g1 y) (g2 y): isaprop (g1 y = g2 y)
∥ g1 y = g2 y ∥
 assumption.
Defined.

(** ** Epimorphisms are surjections to sets

The proof goes as follows :

Let p : A -> B be an epi.

Let f,g : B -> P(B) defined by
f(x) = {x}
g(x) = p(p^-1({x})) (either {x} or the empty set if x is not in the image)

Then f o p = g o p, so f = g, so p is surjective
 *)


A: Type
B: hSet
isaset (A → B)


A: Type
B: hSet
isaset (A → B)

  
A: Type
B: hSet
isaset (A → B)

  
A: Type
B: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (A → B)

  
A: Type
B: hSet
A → isofhlevel 2 B

  apply (λ _, (pr2 B)).
Qed.

TODO find a proof without univalence for propositions (if possible)
*)

A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
epip: ∏ (C : hSet) (g1 g2 : B → C),
(∏ x : A, g1 (p x) = g2 (p x))
→ ∏ y : B, g1 y = g2 y
issurjective p

p: A → B
isB: isaset B
epip: ∏ (C : hSet) (g1 g2 : B → C),
(∏ x : A, g1 (p x) = g2 (p x))
→ ∏ y : B, g1 y = g2 y
issurjective p

A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
epip: ∏ (C : hSet) (g1 g2 : B → C),
(∏ x : A, g1 (p x) = g2 (p x))
→ ∏ y : B, g1 y = g2 y
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
issurjective p

  
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
issurjective p

  
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
(∏ y : B,
 (λ x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p y, x = p (pr1 y0)) =
 (λ x : B, make_hProp (x = y) (isB x y)))
→ issurjective p

(λ x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p (p x), x0 = p (pr1 y)) =
(λ x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = p x) (isB x0 (p x)))

 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))

A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))

y: B
h: (∃ y0 : hfiber p y, y = p (pr1 y0)) =
make_hProp (y = y) (isB y y)

A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
y: B
typ:= make_hProp (y = y) (isB y y): hProp
h: (∃ y0 : hfiber p y, y = p (pr1 y0)) = typ
∥ hfiber p y ∥

(λ x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = p x) (isB x0 (p x)))

(λ x : B, make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b)))
