 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
(∃ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y))
→ make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
 
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
(∑ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y))
→ make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))

      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
y: hfiber p (p b)
eqx: x = p (pr1 y)
make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))

      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
y: hfiber p (p b)
eqx: x = p (pr1 y)
make_hProp (p (pr1 y) = p b) (isB (p (pr1 y)) (p b))

      apply (hfiberpr2 _ _ y).
    
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
→ ∃ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y)
 
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
∃ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y)

      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
∑ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y)

      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
hfiber p (p b)
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
(λ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y)) ?pr1

      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
hfiber p (p b)
 
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
p b = p b
 apply idpath.
      
A, B: UU
p: A → B
isB: isaset B
pred_set: isaset (B → hProp)
epip: (∏ x : A,
 (λ b x0 : B, ∃ y : hfiber p b, x0 = p (pr1 y))
   (p x) =
 (λ b x0 : B, make_hProp (x0 = b) (isB x0 b))
   (p x))
→ ∏ y : B,
  (λ b x : B, ∃ y0 : hfiber p b, x = p (pr1 y0))
    y =
  (λ b x : B, make_hProp (x = b) (isB x b)) y
b: A
x: B
eqx: make_hProp (x = p b) (isB x (p b))
(λ y : hfiber p (p b), x = p (pr1 y))
  (b,, idpath (p b))
 exact eqx.
Qed.


(** ** Universal property enjoyed by surjections
<<
    f
 A ---> C
 |
 | p
 |
 v
 B
>>

If p is surjective and forall x, y dans A, p(x)=p(y) => f(x)=f(y)
then there exists a unique function from B to C that makes the diagram commute
*)
Section LiftSurjection.

  Context {A B C :UU}.
  Hypothesis hsc:isaset C.
  Variables (p : A -> B ) (f: A -> C ).

  Hypothesis comp_f_epi: ∏ x y, p x =  p y -> f x = f y.
  Hypothesis surjectivep : issurjective p.

  (* Reformulation of the previous hypothesis *)
  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ b : B, iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ b : B, iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
isaprop
  (iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x))))
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
hfiber p b
→ iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
isaprop
  (iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x))))
 apply isapropiscontr. 
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
hfiber p b
→ iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
iscontr (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
isaprop (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x))

    (* inspired by isapropimeqclass *)
    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
isaprop (image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)))
  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
∏ x1 x2 : C,
∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x1 ∥
→ ∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x2 ∥
  → x1 = x2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x1 ∥
→ ∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x2 ∥
  → x1 = x2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x1
→ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x2
  → make_hProp (x1 = x2) (hsc x1 x2)

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
y1: hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x1
y2: hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x2
x1 = x2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
z1: A
h1: p z1 = b
h1': f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = x1
y2: hfiber (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x)) x2
x1 = x2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
z1: A
h1: p z1 = b
h1': f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = x1
z2: A
h2: p z2 = b
h2': f (pr1 (z2,, h2)) = x2
x1 = x2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
z1: A
h1: p z1 = b
h1': f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = x1
z2: A
h2: p z2 = b
h2': f (pr1 (z2,, h2)) = x2
f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = f (pr1 (z2,, h2))

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
z1: A
h1: p z1 = b
h1': f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = x1
z2: A
h2: p z2 = b
h2': f (pr1 (z2,, h2)) = x2
p z1 = p z2

       
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
x1, x2: C
z1: A
h1: p z1 = b
h1': f (pr1 (z1,, h1)) = x1
z2: A
h2: p z2 = b
h2': f (pr1 (z2,, h2)) = x2
b = b

       apply idpath.
    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
image (λ x : hfiber p b, f (pr1 x))
 
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
b: B
H: hfiber p b
hfiber p b
 apply H.
  Defined.

  Definition univ_surj : B -> C :=
    λ b, (pr1 (pr1 (surjective_iscontr_im b))).

  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ x : A, univ_surj (p x) = f x

  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ x : A, univ_surj (p x) = f x

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
univ_surj (p x) = f x

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
f x = univ_surj (p x)

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
isaprop
  (∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥)
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
hfiber p (p x)
→ ∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
isaprop
  (∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥)
 apply isapropishinh. 
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
hfiber p (p x)
→ ∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
r: hfiber p (p x)
∥ hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x) ∥
 
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
r: hfiber p (p x)
hfiber (λ x : hfiber p (p x), f (pr1 x)) (f x)

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
r: hfiber p (p x)
f (pr1 r) = f x

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
x: A
r: hfiber p (p x)
p (pr1 r) = p x

    apply (pr2 r).
  Qed.

  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ g : B → C,
(∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a) → ∏ b : B, g b = univ_surj b

  
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
∏ g : B → C,
(∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a) → ∏ b : B, g b = univ_surj b

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
g: B → C
H: ∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a
b: B
g b = univ_surj b

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
g: B → C
H: ∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a
b: B
∏ x : A, g (p x) = univ_surj (p x)

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
g: B → C
H: ∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a
b: B
x: A
g (p x) = univ_surj (p x)

    
A, B, C: UU
hsc: isaset C
p: A → B
f: A → C
comp_f_epi: ∏ x y : A, p x = p y → f x = f y
surjectivep: issurjective p
g: B → C
H: ∏ a : A, g (p a) = f a
b: B
x: A
f x = f x
 apply idpath.
  Qed.



End LiftSurjection.




(** ** Set quotients of types.

In this file we study the set quotients of types by equivalence relations. While
the general notion of a quotient of a type by a relation is complicated due to
the existence of different kinds of quotients (e.g. homotopy quotients or
categorical quotients in the homotopy category which are usually different from
each other) there is one particular class of quotients which is both very
important for applications and semantically straightforward. These quotients are
the universal functions from a type to an hset which respect a given relation.
Some of the proofs in this section depend on the proerties of the hinhabited
construction and some also depend on the univalence axiom for [hProp] which
allows us to prove that the type of monic subtypes of a type is a set.

Our main construction is analogous to the usual construction of quotient as a
set of equivalence classes. Wev also consider another construction of [setquot]
which is analogous (on the next h-level) to our construction of [ishinh]. Both
have generalizations to the "higher" quotients (i.e. groupoid quotients etc.)
which will be considered separately. In particular, the quotients the next
h-level appear to be closely related to the localizations of categories and will
be considered in the section about types of h-level 3.
*)



(** *** Setquotient defined in terms of equivalence classes *)


Definition setquot {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU
  := total2 (λ A : _, iseqclass R A).
Definition make_setquot {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (A : hsubtype X)
           (is : iseqclass R A) : setquot R := tpair _ A is.
Definition pr1setquot {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : setquot R -> (hsubtype X)
  := @pr1 _ (λ A : _, iseqclass R A).
Coercion pr1setquot : setquot >-> hsubtype.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isincl (pr1setquot R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isincl (pr1setquot R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
∏ x : hsubtype X, isaprop (iseqclass R x)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
x0: hsubtype X
isaprop (iseqclass R x0)
 apply isapropiseqclass.
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
isaset (setquot R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isaset (setquot R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isincl pr1

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
x: hsubtype X
isaprop (iseqclass R x)

  apply isapropiseqclass.
Defined.

Definition setquotinset {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : hSet :=
  make_hSet _ (isasetsetquot R).

(** *** Universal property of [seqtquot R] for functions to sets satisfying compatibility condition [iscomprelfun] *)


Definition iscomprelfun {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) (f : X -> Y) : UU
  := ∏ x x' : X, R x x' -> f x = f x'.


X, Y: UU
R, L: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun L f
iscomprelfun R f

R, L: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun L f
iscomprelfun R f

is: iscomprelfun L f
iscomprelfun R f

R, L: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun L f
x, x': X
r: R x x'
f x = f x'
 apply (is _ _ (pr2 (lg  _ _) r)).
Defined.

(** Note : the axioms rax, sax and trans are not used in the proof of
  setquotuniv. If we consider a relation which is not an equivalence relation
  then setquot will still be the set of subsets which are equivalence classes.
  Now however such subsets need not to cover all of the type. In fact their set
  can be empty. Nevertheless setquotuniv will apply. *)



X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
∏ x : X, setquotuniv R Y f is (setquotpr R x) = f x


X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
∏ x : X, setquotuniv R Y f is (setquotpr R x) = f x

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
x: X
setquotuniv R Y f is (setquotpr R x) = f x
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
x: X
pr1image (λ x : setquotpr R x, f (pr1 x))
  (hinhuniv
     (prtoimage (λ x : setquotpr R x, f (pr1 x)))
     (eqax0 (pr2 (setquotpr R x)))) = f x
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
x: X
pr1image
  (λ x : (λ x0 : X, R x x0),,
         hinhpr (x,, eqrelrefl R x),,
         (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x1 x2) (X2 : R x x1),
          eqreltrans R x x1 x2 X2 X1),,
         (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x x1) (X2 : R x x2),
          eqreltrans R x1 x x2 (eqrelsymm R x x1 X1)
            X2), f (pr1 x))
  (hinhuniv
     (prtoimage
        (λ x : (λ x0 : X, R x x0),,
               hinhpr (x,, eqrelrefl R x),,
               (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x1 x2)
                (X2 : R x x1),
                eqreltrans R x x1 x2 X2 X1),,
               (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x x1)
                (X2 : R x x2),
                eqreltrans R x1 x x2
                  (eqrelsymm R x x1 X1) X2), f (pr1 x)))
     (eqax0
        (pr2
           ((λ x0 : X, R x x0),,
            hinhpr (x,, eqrelrefl R x),,
            (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x1 x2)
             (X2 : R x x1), eqreltrans R x x1 x2 X2 X1),,
            (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x x1)
             (X2 : R x x2),
             eqreltrans R x1 x x2
               (eqrelsymm R x x1 X1) X2))))) = f x

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelfun R f
x: X
f x = f x
 apply idpath.
Defined.

R x x' ≃ setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

R x x'

X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
e: setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
e':= maponpaths pr1 e: pr1 (setquotpr R x) = pr1 (setquotpr R x')
R x x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
e: setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
e':= maponpaths pr1 e: pr1
  ((λ x0 : X, R x x0),,
   hinhpr (x,, eqrelrefl R x),,
   (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x1 x2) (X2 : R x x1),
    eqreltrans R x x1 x2 X2 X1),,
   (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x x1) (X2 : R x x2),
    eqreltrans R x1 x x2 (eqrelsymm R x x1 X1) X2)) =
pr1
  ((λ x : X, R x' x),,
   hinhpr (x',, eqrelrefl R x'),,
   (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x1 x2) (X2 : R x' x1),
    eqreltrans R x' x1 x2 X2 X1),,
   (λ (x1 x2 : X) (X1 : R x' x1) (X2 : R x' x2),
    eqreltrans R x1 x' x2 (eqrelsymm R x' x1 X1)
      X2))
R x x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
e: setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
e':= maponpaths pr1 e: (λ x0 : X, R x x0) = (λ x : X, R x' x)
R x x'

    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
e: setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
e':= maponpaths pr1 e: (λ x0 : X, R x x0) = (λ x : X, R x' x)
e'':= maponpaths (λ f : X → hProp, f x') e': (λ f : X → hProp, f x') (λ x0 : X, R x x0) =
(λ f : X → hProp, f x') (λ x : X, R x' x)
R x x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
e: setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
e':= maponpaths pr1 e: (λ x0 : X, R x x0) = (λ x : X, R x' x)
e'':= maponpaths (λ f : X → hProp, f x') e': R x x' = R x' x'
R x x'

    apply (eqweqmaphProp (pathsinv0 e'') (eqrelrefl R x')).
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
isaprop (R x x')
 apply (pr2 (R x x')).
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
isaprop (setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
x, x': X
int:= isasetsetquot R (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'): isaprop (setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
isaprop (setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
 assumption.
Defined.



(** *** Functoriality of [setquot] for functions mapping one relation to another *)


Definition iscomprelrelfun {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y) (f : X -> Y)
  : UU := ∏ x x' : X, RX x x' -> RY (f x) (f x').


X, Y: UU
LX, RX: hrel X
RY: hrel Y
lg: hrellogeq LX RX
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun LX RY f
iscomprelrelfun RX RY f


X, Y: UU
LX, RX: hrel X
RY: hrel Y
lg: hrellogeq LX RX
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun LX RY f
iscomprelrelfun RX RY f

  
X, Y: UU
LX, RX: hrel X
RY: hrel Y
lg: hrellogeq LX RX
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun LX RY f
iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
 
X, Y: UU
LX, RX: hrel X
RY: hrel Y
lg: hrellogeq LX RX
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun LX RY f
x, x': X
r: RX x x'
RY (f x) (f x')
 apply (is _ _ (pr2 (lg  _ _) r)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
LY, RY: hrel Y
lg: hrellogeq LY RY
f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun RX LY f
iscomprelrelfun RX RY f

f: X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun RX LY f
x, x': X
r: RX x x'
RY (f x) (f x')
 apply ((pr1 (lg _ _)) (is _ _ r)).
Defined.

X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X

 apply idpath.
Defined.

P (setquotpr R (pr1 x))

  exact (ps (pr1 x)).

     (setquotpr R x''))

  (P (setquotpr R x0) (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))

P (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
  (setquotpr R x'') (setquotpr R x''')
c, c', c'', c''': setquot R
int1: ∏ c0 c0' c0'' : setquot R, P c c0 c0' c0''
P c c' c'' c'''

  apply (int1 c' c'' c''').
Defined.


(** Important note : theorems proved above can not be used (al least at the
  moment) to construct terms whose complete normalization (evaluation) is
  important. For example they should not be used * directly * to construct
  [isdeceq] property of [setquot] since [isdeceq] is in turn used to construct
  boolean equality [booleq] and evaluation of [booleq x y] is important for
  computational purposes. Terms produced using these universality theorems will
  not fully normalize even in simple cases due to the following steps in the
  proof of [setquotunivprop]. As a part of the proof term of this theorem there
  appears the composition of an application of [hPropUnivalence], transfer of
  the resulting term of the identity type by [maponpaths] along [P] followed by
  the reconstruction of a equivalence (two directional implication) between the
  corresponding propositions through [eqweqmaphProp]. The resulting
  implications are "opaque" and the proofs of disjunctions [P \/ Q] produced
  with the use of such implications can not be evaluated to one of the summands
  of the disjunction. An example is given by the following theorem
  [isdeceqsetquot_non_constr] which, as simple experiments show, can not be used
  to compute the value of [isdeceqsetquot]. Below we give another proof of
  [isdeceq (setquot R)] using the same assumptions which is "constructive"
  i.e. usable for the evaluation purposes. *)

(** *** The case when [setquotfun] is a surjection, inclusion or a weak equivalence *)


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
issurjective (setquotfun RX RY f is1)


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
issurjective (setquotfun RX RY f is1)

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
issurjective (setquotfun RX RY f is1)
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
issurjective (setquotfun RX RY f is1 ∘ setquotpr RX)

  apply (issurjcomp f (setquotpr RY) is (issurjsetquotpr RY)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
isincl (setquotfun RX RY f is1)


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
isincl (setquotfun RX RY f is1)

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
isincl (setquotfun RX RY f is1)
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
isaset (setquot RX)
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
isaset (setquot RY)
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
∏ x x' : setquot RX,
setquotfun RX RY f is1 x = setquotfun RX RY f is1 x'
→ x = x'

 apply isasetsetquot.

RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
x, x': setquot RX

→ isofhlevel 1 (x = x')
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
x, x': setquot RX
t: setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =

isofhlevel 1 (x = x')

      apply isasetsetquot.
    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
∏ x x' : setquot RX,
setquotfun RX RY f is1 x = setquotfun RX RY f is1 x'
→ x = x'

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
∏ x x' : X,
make_hProp
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x) =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x')
   → setquotpr RX x = setquotpr RX x')
  (is (setquotpr RX x) (setquotpr RX x'))

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
∏ x x' : X,
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x) =
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x')
→ setquotpr RX x = setquotpr RX x'
 
X, Y: UU

RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
x, x': X
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x) =
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x')
→ setquotpr RX x = setquotpr RX x'
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
x, x': X
e: setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x) =
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x')
setquotpr RX x = setquotpr RX x'

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
is: ∏ x x' : setquot RX,
isaprop
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 x =
   setquotfun RX RY f is1 x' → x = x')
x, x': X
e: setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x) =
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x')
e':= invweq (weqpathsinsetquot RY (f x) (f x')) e: RY (f x) (f x')
setquotpr RX x = setquotpr RX x'

    apply (weqpathsinsetquot RX _ _ (is2 x x' e')).
Defined.

Definition setquotincl {X Y : UU} (RX : eqrel X) (RY : eqrel Y) (f : X -> Y)
           (is1 : iscomprelrelfun RX RY f)
           (is2 : ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') -> RX x x') :
  incl (setquot RX) (setquot RY)
  := make_incl (setquotfun RX RY f is1) (isinclsetquotfun RX RY f is1 is2).


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
setquot RX ≃ setquot RY


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
setquot RX ≃ setquot RY

RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y

RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
setquot RX ≃ setquot RY
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
isweq ff

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X

f: X ≃ Y

ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
∏ y y' : Y, RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
y, y': Y
RY (f (invmap f y)) y'
→ RX (invmap f (f (invmap f y))) (invmap f y')

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY

gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
isweq ff

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
isweq ff

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (gg (ff (setquotpr RX x)) = setquotpr RX x)
     (isasetsetquot RX (gg (ff (setquotpr RX x)))
        (setquotpr RX x)))

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
∏ x : X, gg (ff (setquotpr RX x)) = setquotpr RX x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
x: X
gg (ff (setquotpr RX x)) = setquotpr RX x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
x: X
gg (setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x)) =
setquotpr RX x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
x: X
setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2'
  (setquotfun RX RY f is1 (setquotpr RX x)) =
setquotpr RX x

    apply (maponpaths (setquotpr RX) (homotinvweqweq f x)).
  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
isweq ff

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
∏ a : setquot RY, ff (gg a) = a
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
efg: ∏ a : setquot RY, ff (gg a) = a
isweq ff

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
∏ a : setquot RY, ff (gg a) = a

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
∏ x : Y,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (ff (gg (setquotpr RY x)) = setquotpr RY x)
     (isasetsetquot RY (ff (gg (setquotpr RY x)))
        (setquotpr RY x)))

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
∏ x : Y, ff (gg (setquotpr RY x)) = setquotpr RY x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
x: Y
ff (gg (setquotpr RY x)) = setquotpr RY x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
x: Y
setquotfun RX RY f is1 (gg (setquotpr RY x)) =
setquotpr RY x
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
x: Y
setquotfun RX RY f is1
  (setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2' (setquotpr RY x)) =
setquotpr RY x

    apply (maponpaths (setquotpr RY) (homotweqinvweq f x)).
  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X ≃ Y
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
is2': ∏ y y' : Y,
RY y y' → RX (invmap f y) (invmap f y')
gg:= setquotfun RY RX (invmap f) is2': setquot RY → setquot RX
egf: ∏ a : setquot RX, gg (ff a) = a
efg: ∏ a : setquot RY, ff (gg a) = a
isweq ff

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.

RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
setquot RX ≃ setquot RY

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → Y
is: issurjective f
is1: iscomprelrelfun RX RY f
is2: ∏ x x' : X, RY (f x) (f x') → RX x x'
ff:= setquotfun RX RY f is1: setquot RX → setquot RY
issurjective ff

  apply (issurjsetquotfun RX RY f is is1).
Defined.



(** *** [setquot] with respect to the product of two relations *)




X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
cc: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
setquot RX × setquot RY


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
cc: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
setquot RX × setquot RY

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
cc: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
setquot RX × setquot RY

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
cc: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
RXY:= eqreldirprod RX RY: eqrel (X × Y)
setquot RX × setquot RY

  apply (make_dirprod
           (setquotuniv RXY (setquotinset RX)
                        (funcomp (@pr1 _ (λ x : _, Y)) (setquotpr RX))
                        (λ xy xy' : dirprod X Y,
                           λ rr : RXY xy xy',
                             iscompsetquotpr RX _ _ (pr1 rr)) cc)
           (setquotuniv RXY (setquotinset RY) (funcomp (@pr2 _ (λ x : _, Y))
                                                       (setquotpr RY))
                        (λ xy xy' : dirprod X Y,
                           λ rr : RXY xy xy',
                             iscompsetquotpr RY _ _ (pr2 rr)) cc)).
Defined.

Definition dirprodtosetquot {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y)
           (cd : (setquot RX) × (setquot RY)) :
  setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
  := make_setquot _ _ (iseqclassdirprod (pr2 (pr1 cd)) (pr2 (pr2 cd))).

RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY) ≃ setquot RX × setquot RY

RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
∏ x : X × Y,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (g (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) x)) =
      setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) x)
     (isasetsetquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (g (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) x)))
        (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) x)))

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
xy: X × Y
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (g (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) xy)) =
      setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) xy)
     (isasetsetquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (g (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) xy)))
        (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) xy)))

RY: eqrel Y

→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
x: X
y: Y
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (g (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) (x,, y))) =
      setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) (x,, y))
     (isasetsetquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (g
           (f (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) (x,, y))))
        (setquotpr (eqreldirprod RX RY) (x,, y))))

(λ x0 : X × Y, hreldirprod RX RY (x,, y) x0)

xy': X × Y

  xy' = hreldirprod RX RY (x,, y) xy'

y: Y
x': X
y': Y
subtypesdirprod (λ x0 : X, RX x x0) (λ x : Y, RY y x)
  (x',, y') = hreldirprod RX RY (x,, y) (x',, y')
 apply idpath.

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY

→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)

ay: setquot RY
f (g (ax,, ay)) = ax,, ay
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RX)
  (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
   iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') (pr1 rr))
  (g (ax,, ay)) = ax

ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (ax,, ay)) = ay

  (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY

ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
ay: setquot RY
∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
         iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
           (pr1 rr)) (g (setquotpr RX x,, ay)) =
      setquotpr RX x)
     (isasetsetquot RX
        (setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY)
           (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
            iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
              (pr1 rr)) (g (setquotpr RX x,, ay)))
        (setquotpr RX x)))

  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),

pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
         iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
           (pr1 rr)) (g (setquotpr RX x,, ay)) =
      setquotpr RX x)
     (isasetsetquot RX
        (setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY)
           (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
            iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
              (pr1 rr)) (g (setquotpr RX x,, ay)))
        (setquotpr RX x)))

egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
ay: setquot RY
x: X
setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RX)
  (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
   iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') (pr1 rr))
  (g (setquotpr RX x,, ay)) = setquotpr RX x
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (ax,, ay)) = ay

  (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY

→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
∏ x0 : Y,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
               × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
         iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
           (pr1 rr))
        (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY x0)) =
      setquotpr RX x)
     (isasetsetquot RX
        (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
           (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
                  × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
            iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
              (pr1 rr))
           (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY x0)))
        (setquotpr RX x)))

→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)

ax: setquot RX
ay: setquot RY
setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (ax,, ay)) = ay

RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY

→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)

x: X
y: Y
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
               × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
         iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
           (pr1 rr))
        (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) =
      setquotpr RX x)
     (isasetsetquot RX
        (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
           (setquotinset RX) (setquotpr RX ∘ pr1)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
                  × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
            iscompsetquotpr RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
              (pr1 rr))
           (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)))
        (setquotpr RX x)))

  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)

X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY

∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (eqreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RY) (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),

           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : eqreldirprod RX RY xy xy'),
            iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')

     (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)

           (setquotinset RY) (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
                  × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
            iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')
              (pr2 rr))
           (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY x0)))
        (setquotpr RY x0)))

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y: Y
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
        (setquotinset RY) (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
        (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
         (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
               × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
         iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')
           (pr2 rr))
        (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) =
      setquotpr RY y)
     (isasetsetquot RY
        (setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY)
           (setquotinset RY) (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
           (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
            (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy')
                  × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
            iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')
              (pr2 rr))
           (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)))
        (setquotpr RY y)))
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y: Y
setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) =
setquotpr RY y

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y: Y
setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) =
setquotpr RY y
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y: Y
setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) ~
setquotpr RY y

    
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y, x0: Y
setquotuniv (hreldirprod RX RY) (setquotinset RY)
  (setquotpr RY ∘ pr2)
  (λ (xy xy' : X × Y)
   (rr : RX (pr1 xy) (pr1 xy') × RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy')),
   iscompsetquotpr RY (pr2 xy) (pr2 xy') (pr2 rr))
  (g (setquotpr RX x,, setquotpr RY y)) x0 =
setquotpr RY y x0
 
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
x: X
y, x0: Y
RY y x0 = RY y x0
 apply idpath.
  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f:= setquottodirprod RX RY: setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY)
→ setquot RX × setquot RY
g:= dirprodtosetquot RX RY: setquot RX × setquot RY
→ setquot (hreldirprod RX RY)
egf: ∏ a : setquot (eqreldirprod RX RY), g (f a) = a
efg: ∏ a : setquot RX × setquot RY, f (g a) = a
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.



(** *** Universal property of [setquot] for functions of two variables *)

Definition iscomprelfun2 {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) (f : X -> X -> Y) : UU
  := ∏ x x' x0 x0' : X, R x x' -> R x0 x0' -> f x x0 = f x' x0'.


X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
iscomprelfun2 R f


X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
iscomprelfun2 R f

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
iscomprelfun2 R f
 
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
x, x', x0, x0': X
R x x' → R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x' x0'
 
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r': R x0 x0'
f x x0 = f x' x0'

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r': R x0 x0'
e:= is1 x x' x0 r: f x x0 = f x' x0
f x x0 = f x' x0'

  
X, Y: UU
R: hrel X
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, R x x' → f x x0 = f x' x0
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, R x0 x0' → f x x0 = f x x0'
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r': R x0 x0'
e:= is1 x x' x0 r: f x x0 = f x' x0
e':= is2 x' x0 x0' r': f x' x0 = f x' x0'
f x x0 = f x' x0'

  apply (pathscomp0 e e').
Defined.


X, Y: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 L f
iscomprelfun2 R f


X, Y: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 L f
iscomprelfun2 R f

  
X, Y: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 L f
iscomprelfun2 R f
 
X, Y: UU
L, R: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq L R
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 L f
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
f x x0 = f x' x0'

  apply (is _ _ _ _ ((pr2 (lg _ _)) r) ((pr2 (lg _ _)) r0)).
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
iscomprelfun (hreldirprod R R)
  (λ xy : X × X, f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))


X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
iscomprelfun (hreldirprod R R)
  (λ xy : X × X, f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy))

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y

xy, x'y': X × X

→ f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy) = f (pr1 x'y') (pr2 x'y')

Y: hSet

R (pr1 xy) (pr1 x'y') × R (pr2 xy) (pr2 x'y')
→ f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy) = f (pr1 x'y') (pr2 x'y')

Y: hSet

is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
xy, x'y': X × X

X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet

is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
xy, x'y': X × X
r: R (pr1 xy) (pr1 x'y')
r': R (pr2 xy) (pr2 x'y')
f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy) = f (pr1 x'y') (pr2 x'y')

  apply (is _ _ _ _ r r').
Defined.
Global Opaque setquotuniv2_iscomprelfun.


X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
Y

Y

Y

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
ff:= λ xy : X × X, f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy): X × X → Y
Y

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
c, c0: setquot R
ff:= λ xy : X × X, f (pr1 xy) (pr2 xy): X × X → Y
RR:= hreldirprod R R: hrel (X × X)
Y

  apply (setquotuniv RR Y ff (setquotuniv2_iscomprelfun R Y f is c c0)
                     (dirprodtosetquot R R (make_dirprod c c0))).
Defined.


X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
∏ x x' : X,
setquotuniv2 R Y f is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
f x x'


X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
∏ x x' : X,
setquotuniv2 R Y f is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
f x x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
Y: hSet
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelfun2 R f
x, x': X
setquotuniv2 R Y f is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
f x x'
 apply idpath.
Defined.



(** *** Functoriality of [setquot] for functions of two variables mapping one relation to another *)


Definition iscomprelrelfun2 {X Y : UU} (RX : hrel X) (RY : hrel Y)
           (f : X -> X -> Y) : UU
  := ∏ x x' x0 x0' : X, RX x x' -> RX x0 x0' -> RY (f x x0) (f x' x0').


X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f


X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f

  
X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f

RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
x, x', x0, x0': X
RX x x' → RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0')

RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y

is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: RX x x'
r': RX x0 x0'
RY (f x x0) (f x' x0')

  
X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: RX x x'
r': RX x0 x0'
e:= is1 x x' x0 r: RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
RY (f x x0) (f x' x0')
 
X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is1: ∏ x x' x0 : X, RX x x' → RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
is2: ∏ x x0 x0' : X, RX x0 x0' → RY (f x x0) (f x x0')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: RX x x'
r': RX x0 x0'
e:= is1 x x' x0 r: RY (f x x0) (f x' x0)
e':= is2 x' x0 x0' r': RY (f x' x0) (f x' x0')
RY (f x x0) (f x' x0')

  apply (eqreltrans RY _ _ _ e e').
Defined.

r0: RX x0 x0'
RY (f x x0) (f x' x0')

Global Opaque setquotfun2_iscomprelfun2.

X, Y: UU
RX: hrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f
cx, cx0: setquot RX
ff:= λ x x0 : X, setquotpr RY (f x x0): X → X → setquot RY
setquot RY

  exact (setquotuniv2 RX (setquotinset RY) ff (setquotfun2_iscomprelfun2 RX RY f is cx cx0) cx cx0).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f
∏ x x' : X,
setquotfun2 RX RY f is (setquotpr RX x)
  (setquotpr RX x') = setquotpr RY (f x x')


X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f
∏ x x' : X,
setquotfun2 RX RY f is (setquotpr RX x)
  (setquotpr RX x') = setquotpr RY (f x x')

  
X, Y: UU
RX: eqrel X
RY: eqrel Y
f: X → X → Y
is: iscomprelrelfun2 RX RY f
x, x': X
setquotfun2 RX RY f is (setquotpr RX x)
  (setquotpr RX x') = setquotpr RY (f x x')
 apply idpath.
Defined.



(** *** Set quotients with respect to decidable equivalence relations have decidable equality *)



X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isdeceq (setquot R)


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isdeceq (setquot R)

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isdeceq (setquot R)

R: eqrel X

∏ x x' : setquot R, isdecprop (x = x')

  (isdecprop (setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'))
  (isapropisdecprop (setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'))

R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
x0, x0': X
make_hProp
  (isdecprop (setquotpr R x0 = setquotpr R x0'))
  (isapropisdecprop (setquotpr R x0 = setquotpr R x0'))
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
x0, x0': X
isdecprop (setquotpr R x0 = setquotpr R x0')

  apply (isdecpropweqf (weqpathsinsetquot R x0 x0') (is x0 x0')).
Defined.

X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
∏ x x' x0 x0' : X,
R x x'
→ R x0 x0'
  → setquotbooleqint R is x x0 =
    setquotbooleqint R is x' x0'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
setquotbooleqint R is x x0 =
setquotbooleqint R is x' x0'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (pr1 (is x x0)) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (pr1 (is x' x0'))

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
r1: R x x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inl r1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (pr1 (is x' x0'))
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
nr1: ¬ R x x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inr nr1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (pr1 (is x' x0'))

  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (pr1 (is x' x0'))

x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
r1: R x x0
r1': R x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)

nr1': ¬ R x' x0'

  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inl r1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)

  (inr nr1')

    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
r1: R x x0
r1': R x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inl r1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (inl r1')
 apply idpath.
    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
r1: R x x0
nr1': ¬ R x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inl r1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (inr nr1')
 induction (nr1' (eqreltrans
                        R _ _ _ (eqreltrans
                                   R _ _ _ (eqrelsymm R _ _ r) r1) r0)).

X: UU
R: eqrel X

x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
nr1: ¬ R x x0
r1': R x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inr nr1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (inl r1')
 induction (nr1 (eqreltrans
                       R _ _ _ r (eqreltrans
                                    R _ _ _ r1' (eqrelsymm R _ _ r0)))).
    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
nr1: ¬ R x x0
nr1': ¬ R x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x0 ⨿ ¬ R x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x0, false)
  (inr nr1) =
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x' x0' ⨿ ¬ R x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : R x' x0', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x' x0', false)
  (inr nr1')
 apply idpath.
Defined.


Definition setquotbooleq {X : UU} (R : eqrel X)
           (is : ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')) :
  setquot R -> setquot R -> bool
  := setquotuniv2 R (make_hSet _ (isasetbool)) (setquotbooleqint R is)
                  (setquotbooleqintcomp R is).


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x'


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
∏ x x' : setquot R,
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
∏ x x' : setquot R,
isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')

R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
∏ x x' : setquot R,
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x'

∏ x x' : setquot R,

X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → isofhlevel 1 (x = x')
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
t: setquotbooleq R is x x' = true
isofhlevel 1 (x = x')
 apply (isasetsetquot R x x').
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
∏ x x' : setquot R,
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
∏ x x' : X,
make_hProp
  (setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
   true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
  (isp (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
∏ x x' : X,
setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
setquotbooleqint R is x x' = true
→ setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (pr1 (is x x')) = true
→ setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i1: R x x'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inl i1) = true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i2: ¬ R x x'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inr i2) = true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i1: R x x'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inl i1) = true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i1: R x x'
X0: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inl i1) = true
setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
 apply (weqpathsinsetquot R _ _ i1).
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i2: ¬ R x x'
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inr i2) = true → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isp: ∏ x x' : setquot R, isaprop (setquotbooleq R is x x' = true → x = x')
x, x': X
i2: ¬ R x x'
H: coprod_rect (λ _ : R x x' ⨿ ¬ R x x', bool)
  (λ _ : R x x', true) (λ _ : ¬ R x x', false)
  (inr i2) = true
setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'
 induction (nopathsfalsetotrue H).
Defined.


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
x = x' → setquotbooleq R is x x' = true


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
x = x' → setquotbooleq R is x x' = true

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
e: x = x'
setquotbooleq R is x x' = true

R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
setquotbooleq R is x x = true
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
∏ x : setquot R, setquotbooleq R is x x = true

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x)
        (setquotpr R x) = true)
     (isasetbool
        (setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x)
           (setquotpr R x)) true))

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
∏ x : X,
setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x) =
true
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
setquotbooleq R is (setquotpr R x0) (setquotpr R x0) =
true

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
setquotbooleqint R is x0 x0 = true

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x0 x0 ⨿ ¬ R x0 x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x0 x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x0 x0, false)
  (pr1 (is x0 x0)) = true
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
i1: R x0 x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x0 x0 ⨿ ¬ R x0 x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x0 x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x0 x0, false)
  (inl i1) = true
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
i2: ¬ R x0 x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x0 x0 ⨿ ¬ R x0 x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x0 x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x0 x0, false)
  (inr i2) = true

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
i1: R x0 x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x0 x0 ⨿ ¬ R x0 x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x0 x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x0 x0, false)
  (inl i1) = true
 apply idpath.
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x: setquot R
x0: X
i2: ¬ R x0 x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : R x0 x0 ⨿ ¬ R x0 x0, bool)
  (λ _ : R x0 x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ R x0 x0, false)
  (inr i2) = true
 induction (i2 (eqrelrefl R x0)).
Defined.


X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
isdeceq (setquot R)

X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
decidable (x = x')

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
i: setquotbooleq R is x x' = true
decidable (x = x')
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
ni: setquotbooleq R is x x' = false
decidable (x = x')

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
i: setquotbooleq R is x x' = true
decidable (x = x')
 apply (ii1 (setquotbooleqtopaths R is x x' i)).
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
ni: setquotbooleq R is x x' = false
decidable (x = x')
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
ni: setquotbooleq R is x x' = false
x != x'
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
is: ∏ x x' : X, isdecprop (R x x')
x, x': setquot R
ni: setquotbooleq R is x x' = false
e: x = x'
∅

    induction (falsetonegtrue _ ni (setquotpathstobooleq R is x x' e)).
Defined.



(** *** Relations on quotient sets

Note that all the properties of the quotient relations which we consider other
than [isantisymm] are also inherited in the opposite direction - if the quotent
relation satisfies the property then the original relation does. *)

Definition iscomprelrel {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (L : hrel X) : UU
  := iscomprelfun2 R L.


X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
iscomprelrel R L


X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
iscomprelrel R L

  
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
iscomprelrel R L
 
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
L x y = L x' y'

  
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
L x y = L x' y'
 
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
L x y = L x' y'

R, L: hrel X

i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
L x y → L x' y'
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
L x' y' → L x y

  
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'

L x y → L x' y'
 
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
lxy: L x y
L x' y'
 
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
lxy: L x y
int1:= i1 x x' y rx lxy: L x' y
L x' y'
 apply (i2 _ _ _ ry int1).
  
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'

L x' y' → L x y

i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
lxy': L x' y'
L x y
 
X: UU
R, L: hrel X
isr: issymm R
i1: ∏ x x' y : X, R x x' → L x y → L x' y
i2: ∏ x y y' : X, R y y' → L x y → L x y'
x, x', y, y': X
rx: R x x'
ry: R y y'
rx':= isr x x' rx: R x' x
ry':= isr y y' ry: R y' y
lxy': L x' y'
int1:= i1 x' x y' rx' lxy': L x y'
L x y
 apply (i2 _ _ _ ry' int1).
Defined.


X: UU
R, R', L: hrel X
lg: hrellogeq R R'
is: iscomprelrel R L
iscomprelrel R' L

iscomprelrel R' L

 apply (iscomprelfun2logeqf lg L is).

r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'

  apply (is _ _ _ _ r r0).
Defined.

Definition quotrel {X : UU} {R L : hrel X} (is : iscomprelrel R L) :
  hrel (setquot R) := setquotuniv2 R hPropset L is.


X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
istrans (quotrel is)


X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
istrans (quotrel is)

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
istrans (quotrel is)
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop
  (quotrel is x1 x2
   → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3

isaprop
  (quotrel is x1 x2
   → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)

isl: istrans L

quotrel is x1 x2
→ isofhlevel 1 (quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)

t: quotrel is x1 x2

X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
x1, x2, x3: setquot R
t: quotrel is x1 x2
t0: quotrel is x2 x3
isofhlevel 1 (quotrel is x1 x3)

    apply (pr2 (quotrel is x1 x3)).
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
∏ x x' x'' : X,
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')
     → quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
x, x', x'': X
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')
     → quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x''))
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: istrans L
int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,
isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x3 → quotrel is x1 x3)
x, x', x'': X
r: quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
r': quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x'')
quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'')

  apply (isl x x' x'' r r').
Defined.

  apply (issymmquotrel is (pr2 isl)).
Defined.

int: ∏ x1 x2 x3 : setquot R,

make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'')
   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')

   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     ∨ quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x''))
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
     (setquotpr R x''))

X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymm L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R, isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymm L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R, isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x x' : X,
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
     → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymm L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R, isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
x, x': X
make_hProp
  (quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
     → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymm L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R, isaprop (quotrel is x1 x2 → quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
x, x': X
r: quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
r': quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (isl x x' r r')).
Defined.

X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
isaprop (¬ quotrel is x1 x2 → ¬ quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
¬ quotrel is x1 x2 → ¬ quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
isaprop (¬ quotrel is x1 x2 → ¬ quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
∏ x x' : X,
make_hProp
  (¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → ¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
     → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
isaprop (¬ quotrel is x1 x2 → ¬ quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
x, x': X
make_hProp
  (¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
   → ¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
     → setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x')
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
isl: isantisymmneg L
int: ∏ x1 x2 : setquot R,
isaprop (¬ quotrel is x1 x2 → ¬ quotrel is x2 x1 → x1 = x2)
x, x': X
r: ¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x')
r': ¬ quotrel is (setquotpr R x') (setquotpr R x)
setquotpr R x = setquotpr R x'

  apply (maponpaths (setquotpr R) (isl x x' r r')).
Defined.

(** We do not have a lemma for [neqchoicequotrel] since [neqchoice] is not a
property and since even when it is a property such as under the additional
condition [isasymm] on the relation it still carrier computational content
(similarly to [isdec]) which would be lost under our current approach of taking
quotients. How to best define [neqchoicequotrel] remains at the moment an open
question.*)



X: UU
R: eqrel X
L, L': hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
is': iscomprelrel R L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': setquot R
ql: quotrel is x x'
quotrel is' x x'

L, L': hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
is': iscomprelrel R L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'
x, x': setquot R
ql: quotrel is x x'
quotrel is' x x'

is': iscomprelrel R L'
impl: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' → L' x x'

ql: quotrel is x x'
quotrel is' x x'

ql: quotrel is x x'
∏ x x' : setquot R, quotrel is x x' → quotrel is' x x'

∏ x0 x0' : setquot R,

    apply (pr2 _).

isaprop (quotrel is x0 x0' → quotrel is' x0 x0')
x0, x0': X
L x0 x0' → L' x0 x0'

  apply (impl x0 x0').
Defined.

is': iscomprelrel R L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': setquot R
quotrel is x x' <-> quotrel is' x x'
