X: UU
R: eqrel X
L, L': hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
is': iscomprelrel R L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': setquot R
quotrel is x x' → quotrel is' x x'
 apply (quotrelimpl is is' (λ x0 x0', pr1 (lg x0 x0')) x x').
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L, L': hrel X
is: iscomprelrel R L
is': iscomprelrel R L'
lg: ∏ x x' : X, L x x' <-> L' x x'
x, x': setquot R
quotrel is' x x' → quotrel is x x'
 apply (quotrelimpl is' is (λ x0 x0', pr2 (lg x0 x0')) x x').
Defined.


(** Constructive proof of decidability of the quotient relation *)



X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
brel (setquot R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
brel (setquot R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
brel (setquot R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= decreltobrel L: brel X
brel (setquot R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= decreltobrel L: brel X
setquot R → setquot R → bool

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= decreltobrel L: brel X
iscomprelfun2 R f

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= decreltobrel L: brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
f x x0 = f x' x0'
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= decreltobrel L: brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
decreltobrel L x x0 = decreltobrel L x' x0'
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (pr2 L x x0) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (pr2 L x' x0')

  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (pr2 L x x0) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (pr2 L x' x0')

l: pr1 L x x0'
l': pr1 L x' x0'

e:= is x x' x0 x0' r r0: pr1 L x x0 = pr1 L x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)

R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
l': pr1 L x x0
nl'': ¬ pr1 L x x0

  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inr nl'') =
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inl l')
 induction (nl'' l').
    
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (pr2 L x x0) =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (inr nl')
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x' x0'
l'': pr1 L x x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inl l'') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (inr nl')
X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x' x0'
nl'': ¬ pr1 L x x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inr nl'') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (inr nl')

X: UU
R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X

r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x' x0'
l'': pr1 L x x0
e:= is x x' x0 x0' r r0: pr1 L x x0 = pr1 L x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inl l'') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (inr nl')

f:= λ x x' : X,

  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
l: pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x x0
l'': pr1 L x x0
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inl l'') =
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inr nl')
 induction (nl' l'').

R: hrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
f:= λ x x' : X,
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x', false) (pr2 L x x'): brel X
x, x', x0, x0': X
r: R x x'
r0: R x0 x0'
nl: ¬ pr1 L x x0'
nl': ¬ pr1 L x x0
nl'': ¬ pr1 L x' x0'
coprod_rect (λ _ : pr1 L x x0 ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x x0, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x x0, true) (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x x0, false)
  (inr nl') =
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0' ⨿ ¬ pr1 L x' x0', bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 L x' x0', true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 L x' x0', false) (inr nl'')
 apply idpath.
Defined.


X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
x, x': setquot R
breltodecrel (quotdecrelint L is) x x' <->
quotrel is x x'


X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
x, x': setquot R
breltodecrel (quotdecrelint L is) x x' <->
quotrel is x x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
∏ x x' : setquot R,
breltodecrel (quotdecrelint L is) x x' <->
quotrel is x x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
∏ x x' : setquot R,
isaprop
  (quotdecrelint L is x x' = true <-> quotrel is x x')
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
int: ∏ x x' : setquot R,
isaprop (quotdecrelint L is x x' = true <-> quotrel is x x')
∏ x x' : setquot R,
breltodecrel (quotdecrelint L is) x x' <->
quotrel is x x'

  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
L: decrel X
is: iscomprelrel R (pr1 L)
∏ x x' : setquot R,
isaprop
  (quotdecrelint L is x x' = true <-> quotrel is x x')

make_hProp
  (quotdecrelint L is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x') =
   true <->
   quotrel is (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))
  (int (setquotpr R x) (setquotpr R x'))

           (quotdecrelintlogeq (make_decrel isl) is)
           (pr2 (breltodecrel (quotdecrelint (make_decrel isl) is)))).
Defined.

Definition decquotrel {X : UU} {R : eqrel X} (L : decrel X)
           (is : iscomprelrel R L) : decrel (setquot R)
  := make_decrel (isdecquotrel is (pr2 L)).



(** *** Subtypes of quotients and quotients of subtypes *)


Definition reseqrel {X : UU} (R : eqrel X) (P : hsubtype X) : eqrel P :=
  make_eqrel _ (iseqrelresrel R P (pr2 R)).

isaprop (∏ isp : P p, g (f (p,, isp)) = p,, isp)

R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))

p: setquot R

∏ t : P p, isofhlevel 1 (g (f (p,, t)) = p,, t)
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X

f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))

X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
int: ∏ p : setquot R,
isaprop (∏ isp : P p, g (f (p,, isp)) = p,, isp)
∏ (p : setquot R) (isp : P p),
g (f (p,, isp)) = p,, isp

    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
int: ∏ p : setquot R,
isaprop (∏ isp : P p, g (f (p,, isp)) = p,, isp)
∏ x : X,
pr1
  (make_hProp
     (∏ isp : P (setquotpr R x),
      g (f (setquotpr R x,, isp)) =
      setquotpr R x,, isp) (int (setquotpr R x)))

x: X
isp: P (setquotpr R x)
g (f (setquotpr R x,, isp)) = setquotpr R x,, isp

x: X

    apply idpath.

P: hsubtype (setquot R)

X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))

int0: isaset P
egf: ∏ a : P, g (f a) = a
int: ∏ a : setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)),
isaprop (f (g a) = a)
Q:= reseqrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R): eqrel (P ∘ setquotpr R)
a: P ∘ setquotpr R
fromsubquot R P (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a)) =
setquotpr Q a
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
egf: ∏ a : P, g (f a) = a
int: ∏ a : setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)),
isaprop (f (g a) = a)
Q:= reseqrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R): eqrel (P ∘ setquotpr R)
a: P ∘ setquotpr R
(λ rp : P ∘ setquotpr R,
 pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a)) (pr1 rp)),,
iseqclassresrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)
  (pr1 (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a))))
  (pr2 (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a))))
  (λ (x : X)
   (px : pr1 (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a))) x),
   internal_paths_rew_r (setquot R) (setquotpr R x)
     (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a)))
     (λ s : setquot R, P s)
     (pr2 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a)))
     (setquotl0 R
        (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a)))
        (make_carrier
           (pr1 (pr1 (tosubquot R P (setquotpr Q a))))
           x px))) = setquotpr Q a
 
X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
egf: ∏ a : P, g (f a) = a
int: ∏ a : setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)),
isaprop (f (g a) = a)
Q:= reseqrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R): eqrel (P ∘ setquotpr R)
a: P ∘ setquotpr R
(λ rp : P ∘ setquotpr R,
 pr1
   (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
      (make_hSet P
         (isasetsubset pr1
            (setproperty (setquotinset R))
            (isinclpr1carrier P)))
      (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
       make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp)) (pr2 xp))
      (λ (xp1 xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
       (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
       invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
         (isinclpr1carrier P)
         (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
            (pr2 xp1))
         (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
            (pr2 xp2))
         (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2) rp12))
      (setquotpr Q a)) (pr1 rp)),,
iseqclassresrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
           (make_hSet P
              (isasetsubset pr1
                 (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)))
           (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
            make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
              (pr2 xp))
           (λ (xp1 xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
            (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
            invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
              (isinclpr1carrier P)
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                 (pr2 xp1))
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                 (pr2 xp2))
              (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2)
                 rp12)) (setquotpr Q a))))
  (pr2
     (pr1
        (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
           (make_hSet P
              (isasetsubset pr1
                 (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)))
           (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
            make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
              (pr2 xp))
           (λ (xp1 xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
            (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
            invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
              (isinclpr1carrier P)
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                 (pr2 xp1))
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                 (pr2 xp2))
              (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2)
                 rp12)) (setquotpr Q a))))
  (λ (x : X)
   (px : pr1
           (pr1
              (setquotuniv
                 (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
                 (make_hSet P
                    (isasetsubset pr1
                       (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                       (isinclpr1carrier P)))
                 (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X,
                         (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
                  make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp)) (pr2 xp))
                 (λ (xp1
                     xp2 : ∑ x0 : X,
                           (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
                  (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)
                            xp1 xp2),
                  invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)
                    (make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                       (pr2 xp1))
                    (make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                       (pr2 xp2))
                    (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                       (pr1 xp2) rp12))
                 (setquotpr Q a))) x),
   internal_paths_rew_r (setquot R) (setquotpr R x)
     (pr1
        (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
           (make_hSet P
              (isasetsubset pr1
                 (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)))
           (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
            make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
              (pr2 xp))
           (λ (xp1
               xp2 : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
            (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
            invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
              (isinclpr1carrier P)
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                 (pr2 xp1))
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                 (pr2 xp2))
              (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2)
                 rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)))
     (λ s : setquot R, P s)
     (pr2
        (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
           (make_hSet P
              (isasetsubset pr1
                 (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)))
           (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
            make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
              (pr2 xp))
           (λ (xp1
               xp2 : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
            (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
            invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
              (isinclpr1carrier P)
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                 (pr2 xp1))
              (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                 (pr2 xp2))
              (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2)
                 rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)))
     (setquotl0 R
        (pr1
           (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
              (make_hSet P
                 (isasetsubset pr1
                    (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)))
              (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
               make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                 (pr2 xp))
              (λ (xp1
                  xp2 : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
               (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                         xp2),
               invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1)) (pr2 xp1))
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2)) (pr2 xp2))
                 (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                    (pr1 xp2) rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)))
        (make_carrier
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (setquotuniv
                    (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
                    (make_hSet P
                       (isasetsubset pr1
                          (setproperty
                             (setquotinset R))
                          (isinclpr1carrier P)))
                    (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X,
                            (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
                     make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp)) (pr2 xp))
                    (λ (xp1
                        xp2 : ∑ x0 : X,
                              (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
                     (rp12 : resrel R
                               (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                               xp2),
                     invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                       (isinclpr1carrier P)
                       (make_carrier P
                          (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                          (pr2 xp1))
                       (make_carrier P
                          (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                          (pr2 xp2))
                       (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                          (pr1 xp2) rp12))
                    (setquotpr Q a)))) x px))) =
setquotpr Q a


    (* Compilations hangs here if the next command is "simpl." in
       8.4-8.5-trunk *)

    
X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
egf: ∏ a : P, g (f a) = a
int: ∏ a : setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)),
isaprop (f (g a) = a)
Q:= reseqrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R): eqrel (P ∘ setquotpr R)
a: P ∘ setquotpr R
pr1
  ((λ rp : P ∘ setquotpr R,
    pr1
      (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
         (make_hSet P
            (isasetsubset pr1
               (setproperty (setquotinset R))
               (isinclpr1carrier P)))
         (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
          make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
            (pr2 xp))
         (λ (xp1 xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
          (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1 xp2),
          invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
            (isinclpr1carrier P)
            (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
               (pr2 xp1))
            (make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
               (pr2 xp2))
            (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1) (pr1 xp2)
               rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)) (pr1 rp)),,
   iseqclassresrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
              (make_hSet P
                 (isasetsubset pr1
                    (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)))
              (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
               make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                 (pr2 xp))
              (λ (xp1
                  xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
               (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                         xp2),
               invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1)) (pr2 xp1))
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2)) (pr2 xp2))
                 (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                    (pr1 xp2) rp12)) (setquotpr Q a))))
     (pr2
        (pr1
           (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
              (make_hSet P
                 (isasetsubset pr1
                    (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)))
              (λ xp : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x,
               make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                 (pr2 xp))
              (λ (xp1
                  xp2 : ∑ x : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x)
               (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                         xp2),
               invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1)) (pr2 xp1))
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2)) (pr2 xp2))
                 (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                    (pr1 xp2) rp12)) (setquotpr Q a))))
     (λ (x : X)
      (px : pr1
              (pr1
                 (setquotuniv
                    (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
                    (make_hSet P
                       (isasetsubset pr1
                          (setproperty
                             (setquotinset R))
                          (isinclpr1carrier P)))
                    (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X,
                            (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
                     make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp)) (pr2 xp))
                    (λ (xp1
                        xp2 : ∑ x0 : X,
                              (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
                     (rp12 : resrel R
                               (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                               xp2),
                     invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                       (isinclpr1carrier P)
                       (make_carrier P
                          (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                          (pr2 xp1))
                       (make_carrier P
                          (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                          (pr2 xp2))
                       (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                          (pr1 xp2) rp12))
                    (setquotpr Q a))) x),
      internal_paths_rew_r (setquot R) (setquotpr R x)
        (pr1
           (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
              (make_hSet P
                 (isasetsubset pr1
                    (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)))
              (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
               make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                 (pr2 xp))
              (λ (xp1
                  xp2 : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
               (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                         xp2),
               invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1)) (pr2 xp1))
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2)) (pr2 xp2))
                 (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                    (pr1 xp2) rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)))
        (λ s : setquot R, P s)
        (pr2
           (setquotuniv (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
              (make_hSet P
                 (isasetsubset pr1
                    (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)))
              (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
               make_carrier P (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                 (pr2 xp))
              (λ (xp1
                  xp2 : ∑ x0 : X, (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
               (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R) xp1
                         xp2),
               invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                 (isinclpr1carrier P)
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1)) (pr2 xp1))
                 (make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2)) (pr2 xp2))
                 (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                    (pr1 xp2) rp12)) (setquotpr Q a)))
        (setquotl0 R
           (pr1
              (setquotuniv
                 (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
                 (make_hSet P
                    (isasetsubset pr1
                       (setproperty (setquotinset R))
                       (isinclpr1carrier P)))
                 (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X,
                         (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
                  make_carrier P
                    (setquotpr R (pr1 xp)) (pr2 xp))
                 (λ (xp1
                     xp2 : ∑ x0 : X,
                           (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
                  (rp12 : resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)
                            xp1 xp2),
                  invmaponpathsincl (pr1carrier P)
                    (isinclpr1carrier P)
                    (make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                       (pr2 xp1))
                    (make_carrier P
                       (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                       (pr2 xp2))
                    (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                       (pr1 xp2) rp12))
                 (setquotpr Q a)))
           (make_carrier
              (pr1
                 (pr1
                    (setquotuniv
                       (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
                       (make_hSet P
                          (isasetsubset pr1
                             (setproperty
                                (setquotinset R))
                             (isinclpr1carrier P)))
                       (λ xp : ∑ x0 : X,
                               (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0,
                        make_carrier P
                          (setquotpr R (pr1 xp))
                          (pr2 xp))
                       (λ (xp1
                           xp2 : ∑ x0 : X,
                                 (P ∘ setquotpr R) x0)
                        (rp12 : resrel R
                                  (P ∘ setquotpr R)
                                  xp1 xp2),
                        invmaponpathsincl
                          (pr1carrier P)
                          (isinclpr1carrier P)
                          (make_carrier P
                             (setquotpr R (pr1 xp1))
                             (pr2 xp1))
                          (make_carrier P
                             (setquotpr R (pr1 xp2))
                             (pr2 xp2))
                          (iscompsetquotpr R (pr1 xp1)
                             (pr1 xp2) rp12))
                       (setquotpr Q a)))) x px)))) =
pr1 (setquotpr Q a)

    apply idpath.
  
X: UU
R: eqrel X
P: hsubtype (setquot R)
f:= fromsubquot R P: P → setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R))
g:= tosubquot R P: setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)) → P
int0: isaset P
egf: ∏ a : P, g (f a) = a
efg: ∏ a : setquot (resrel R (P ∘ setquotpr R)),
f (g a) = a
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.

(** Comment: unfortunetely [weqsubquot] is not as useful as it should be at
  moment due to the failure of the following code to work:

  [Lemma test (X : UU) (R : eqrel X) (P : hsubtype (setquot R)) (x : X)
   (is : P (setquotpr R x)) :
     paths (setquotpr (reseqrel R (funcomp (setquotpr R) P)) (tpair _ x is))
           (fromsubquot R P (tpair _ (setquotpr R x) is)).
   Proof. intros. apply idpath. Defined.]

  As one of the consequences we are forced to use a "hack" in the definition of
  multiplicative inverses for rationals in [hqmultinv].

  The issue which arises here is the same one which arises in several other
  places in the work with quotients. It can be traced back first to the failure
  of [invmaponpathsincl] to map [idpath] to [idpath] and then to the fact that
  for [(X : UU) (is : isaprop X)] the term
  [t := proofirrelevance is : ∏ x1 x2 : X, x1 = x2] does not satisfy
  (definitionally) the condition [t x x == idpath x].

  It can and probably should be fixed by the addition of a new componenet to
  CIC in the form of a term constructor:

  tfc (X : UU) (E : X -> UU) (is : ∏ x, iscontr (E x)) (x0 : X) (e0 : E x0) :
     ∏ x : X, E x.

  and a computation rule

   tfc_comp (tfc X E is x0 e0 x0) == e0

  (with both tfc and tfc_comp definable in an arbitrary context)

  Such an extension will be compatible with the univalent models and should not,
  as far as I can see, provide any problems for normalization or for the
  decidability of typing. Using tfc one can give a construction of
  [proofirrelevance] as follows (recall that
  [isaprop := ∏ x1 x2, iscontr (x1 = x2)]) :

  Lemma proofirrelevance {X : UU} (is : isaprop X) : ∏ x1 x2, x1 = x2.
  Proof.
   intros X is x1.
   apply (tfc X (λ x2, x1 = x2) is x1 (idpath x1)).
  Defined.

  Defined in this way [proofirrelevance] will have the required property and
  will enable to define [invmaponpathsincl] in such a way that the existing
  proofs of [setquotl0] and [fromsubquot] and [weqsubquot] will provide the
  desired behavior of [fromsubquot] on terms of the form
  [(tpair _ (setquotpr R x) is)]. *)




(** *** The set of connected components of type. *)



Definition pathshrel (X : UU) : X → X → hProp := λ x x' : X, ishinh (x = x').
Definition istranspathshrel (X : UU) : istrans (pathshrel X)
  := λ x x' x'' : _,
       λ a : _,
         λ b : _,
           hinhfun2 (fun e1 : x = x' => fun e2 : x' = x'' => e1 @ e2) a b.
Definition isreflpathshrel (X : UU) : isrefl (pathshrel X)
  := λ x : _, hinhpr (idpath x).
Definition issymmpathshrel (X : UU) : issymm (pathshrel X)
  := λ x x': _, λ a : _, hinhfun (fun e : x = x' => ! e) a.

Definition pathseqrel (X : UU) : eqrel X
  := eqrelconstr (pathshrel X) (istranspathshrel X) (isreflpathshrel X)
                 (issymmpathshrel X).

Definition pi0 (X : UU) : UU := setquot (pathshrel X).
Definition pi0pr (X : UU) : X -> setquot (pathseqrel X)
  := setquotpr (pathseqrel X).

(** **  Set quotients. Construction 2.


****************** THIS SECTION IS UNFINISHED ******************


Another construction of the set quotient is based on the following idea. Let X
be a set. Then we have the obvious "double evaluation map" from X to the product
over all sets Y of the sets ((X -> Y) -> Y). This is always an inclusion and in
particular X is isomorphic to the image of this map. Suppore now we have a
relation (which need not be an equivalence relation) R on X. Then we know that
(X/R -> Y) is a subset of (X -> Y) which consists of functions compatible with
the relation even if we do not know what X/R is. Thus we may consider the image
of X in the product over all Y of ((X/R -> Y) ->Y) and it must be isomorphic to
X/R. This ideas are realized in the definitions given below. There are two
advantages to this approach. One is that the relation need not be an equivalence
relation. Another one is that it can be more easily generalized to the higher
quotients of type.


We also show that two constructions of set-quotients of types - the one given in
set_quotients and the one given here agree up to an isomorphism
(weak equivalence). *)




(** *** Functions compatible with a relation *)




Definition compfun {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (S : UU) : UU
  := total2 (fun F : X -> S => iscomprelfun R F).
Definition make_compfun {X : UU} (R : hrel X) {S : UU} (f : X -> S)
           (is : iscomprelfun R f) : compfun R S := tpair _ f is.
Definition pr1compfun (X : UU) (R : hrel X) (S : UU) :
  @compfun X R S -> (X -> S) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1compfun : compfun >-> Funclass.

Definition compevmapset {X : UU} (R : hrel X) :
  X -> ∏ S : hSet, (compfun R S) -> S
  := λ x : X, λ S : _, λ f : compfun R S, pr1 f x.


X: UU
R: hrel X
S, S': UU
f: compfun R S
g: S → S'
compfun R S'


X: UU
R: hrel X
S, S': UU
f: compfun R S
g: S → S'
compfun R S'

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
S, S': UU
f: compfun R S
g: S → S'
compfun R S'
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
S, S': UU
f: compfun R S
g: S → S'
iscomprelfun R (g ∘ f)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
S, S': UU
f: compfun R S
g: S → S'
x, x': X
r: R x x'
(g ∘ f) x = (g ∘ f) x'

  apply (maponpaths g (pr2 f x x' r)).
Defined.


(** Tests

Definition F (X Y : UU) (R : hrel X) := (compfun R Y) -> Y.

Definition Fi (X Y : UU) (R : hrel X) : X -> F X Y R := λ x, λ f, f x.

Lemma iscompFi {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) : iscomprelfun R (Fi X Y R).
Proof.
 intros. intros x x' r. unfold Fi. apply funextfun.
 intro f. apply (pr2 f x x' r).
Defined.

Definition Fv {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) (f : compfun R Y) (phi : F X Y R) : Y
 := phi f.

Definition qeq {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X)
:= total2 (λ phi : F X Y R,
                     ∏ psi : F X Y R -> Y,
                             paths (psi phi)
                                   (Fv R (compfuncomp
                                           R (make_compfun R _ (iscompFi R)) psi)
                                                          phi)).

Lemma isinclpr1qeq {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (Y : hSet) :
    isincl (@pr1 _ (λ phi : F X Y R,
                            ∏ psi : F X Y R -> Y,
                                  paths
                                    (psi phi)
                                     (Fv R (compfuncomp
                                              R (make_compfun R _ (iscompFi R))
                                                             psi) phi))).
Proof.
 intros. apply isinclpr1.
 intro phi.
 apply impred. intro psi.
 apply (pr2 Y).
Defined.

Definition toqeq {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) (x : X) : @qeq X Y R.
Proof.
  intros. split with (Fi X Y R x). intro psi. apply idpath.
Defined.

Lemma iscomptoqeq {X : UU} (Y : hSet) (R : hrel X) :
      iscomprelfun R (@toqeq X Y R).
Proof.
 intros. intros x x' r. unfold toqeq.
 apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclpr1qeq R Y)).
 apply (@iscompFi X Y R x x' r).
Defined.

Definition qequniv {X : UU} (Y : hSet) (R : hrel X) (f : compfun R Y)
       (phi : @qeq X Y R) : Y.
Proof.
  intros. apply (Fv R f (pr1 phi)).
Defined.

Lemma qequnivandpr {X : UU} (Y : hSet) (R : hrel X) (f : compfun R Y)
   (x : X) : paths (qequniv Y R f (toqeq R x)) (f x).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.

Lemma etaqeq {X : UU} (Y : hSet) (R : hrel X) (psi : qeq R -> Y)
       (phi : qeq R) : paths (psi phi)
                             (qequniv Y R (compfuncomp
                                              R (make_compfun
                                                    R _ (iscomptoqeq Y R))
                                              psi) phi).
Proof.
  intros. apply (pr2 phi psi).




Definition Fd1 {X Y : UU} : F X Y R -> (F (F X Y) Y) := Fi (F X Y) Y.

Definition Fd2 {X Y : UU} (R : hrel X) (phi : F X Y R) (psi : F X Y R -> Y) :
 Y := (Fv R (funcomp (Fi X Y R) psi) phi).

Definition Ffunct {X1 X2 : UU} (f : X1 -> X2) (Y : UU) : F X1 Y -> F X2 Y
 := λ phi, λ g, phi (funcomp f g).



Lemma testd1 {X Y : UU} (psi : F X Y -> Y) (phi : F X Y) :
  paths (psi phi) (Fd1 phi psi).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.

Lemma testd2 {X Y : UU} (psi : F X Y -> Y) (phi : F X Y) :
   paths (Fv (funcomp (Fi X Y) psi) phi) (Fd2 phi psi).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition F (X Y : UU) := (X -> Y) -> Y.

Definition Ffunct {X1 X2 : UU} (f : X1 -> X2) (Y : UU) : F X1 Y -> F X2 Y
   := λ phi, λ g, phi (funcomp f g).

Definition Fi (X Y : UU) : X -> F X Y := λ x, λ f, f x.

Definition Fd1 {X Y : UU} : F X Y -> (F (F X Y) Y) := Fi (F X Y) Y.

Definition Fd2 {X Y : UU} : F X Y -> (F (F X Y) Y) := Ffunct (Fi X Y) Y.

Definition Fv {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (phi : F X Y) : Y := phi f.

Lemma testd1 {X Y : UU} (psi : F X Y -> Y) (phi : F X Y) :
   paths (psi phi) (Fd1 phi psi).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.

Lemma testd2 {X Y : UU} (psi : F X Y -> Y) (phi : F X Y) :
   paths (Fv (funcomp (Fi X Y) psi) phi) (Fd2 phi psi).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.





Lemma Xineq (X Y : UU) (x : X) : paths (Fd1 (Fi X Y x)) (Fd2 (Fi X Y x)).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.
Defined.

Lemma test (X Y : UU) (phi : F X Y) (f : X -> Y) :
   paths (Fd1 phi (Fi (X -> Y) Y f)) (Fd2 phi (Fi (X -> Y) Y f)).
Proof.
 intros. unfold Fd1. unfold Fd2. unfold Fi. unfold Ffunct. unfold funcomp.
 simpl. apply (maponpaths phi). apply etacorrection.
Defined.

Inductive try0 (T : UU) (t : T) :
   ∏ (t1 t2 : T) (e1 : t = t1) (e2 : t = t2), UU
   := idconstr : ∏ (t' : T) (e' : t = t'), try0 T t t' t' e' e'.

Definition try0map1 (T : UU) (t : T) (t1 t2 : T) (e1 : t = t1)
   (e2 : t = t2) (X : try0 T t t1 t2 e1 e2) : t1 = t2.
Proof.
  intros. induction  X. apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition try0map2 (T : UU) (t : T) (t1 t2 : T) (e1 : t = t1)
   (e2 : t = t2) : try0 T t t1 t2 e1 e2.
Proof.


Lemma test (X : UU) (t : X) :
   paths (pr2 (iscontrcoconustot X t) (pr1 (iscontrcoconustot X t)))
         (idpath _).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.


Lemma test {X : UU} (is : iscontr X) :
   paths (pr2 (iscontrcor is) (pr1 (iscontrcor is))) (idpath _).
Proof.
  intros. apply idpath.




Lemma test {X : UU} (R : eqrel X) (Y : hSet) (f : setquot R -> Y) :
   paths f (setquotuniv R Y (funcomp (setquotpr R) f)
           (λ x x' : X, λ r : R x x',
                                maponpaths f (iscompsetquotpr R x x' r))).
Proof.
 intros. apply funextfun. intro c. simpl. induction c as [ A iseq ]. simpl. *)






(** *** The quotient set of a type by a relation. *)

Definition setquot2 {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : UU := image (compevmapset R).


X: UU
R: hrel X
isaset (setquot2 R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
isaset (setquot2 R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isaset (setquot2 R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 2 (∏ S : hSet, compfun R S → S)
X: UU
R: hrel X
is1: isofhlevel 2 (∏ S : hSet, compfun R S → S)
isaset (setquot2 R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
isofhlevel 2 (∏ S : hSet, compfun R S → S)

    
X: UU
R: hrel X
∏ t : hSet, isofhlevel 2 (compfun R t → t)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
t: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (compfun R t → t)

    
X: UU
R: hrel X
t: hSet
compfun R t → isofhlevel 2 t
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
t: hSet
X0: compfun R t
isofhlevel 2 t

    apply (pr2 t).
  
X: UU
R: hrel X
is1: isofhlevel 2 (∏ S : hSet, compfun R S → S)
isaset (setquot2 R)

  apply (isasetsubset _ is1 (isinclpr1image _)).
Defined.

Definition setquot2inset {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : hSet
  := make_hSet _ (isasetsetquot2 R).

(** We will be asuming below that setquot2 is in UU.  In the future it should
  be proved using [issurjsetquot2pr] below and a resizing axiom. The
  appropriate resizing axiom for this should say that if X -> Y is a surjection,
  Y is an hset and X : UU then Y : UU. *)

Definition setquot2pr {X : UU} (R : hrel X) : X -> setquot2 R
  := λ x : X, make_image (compevmapset R) _
                         (hinhpr (make_hfiber (compevmapset R) x (idpath _))).


X: UU
R: hrel X
issurjective (setquot2pr R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
issurjective (setquot2pr R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
issurjective (setquot2pr R)
 apply issurjprtoimage.
Defined.


X: UU
R: hrel X
iscomprelfun R (setquot2pr R)


X: UU
R: hrel X
iscomprelfun R (setquot2pr R)

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
iscomprelfun R (setquot2pr R)
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
setquot2pr R x = setquot2pr R x'

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
compevmapset R x = compevmapset R x'
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
e1: compevmapset R x = compevmapset R x'
setquot2pr R x = setquot2pr R x'

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
compevmapset R x = compevmapset R x'

    
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
compevmapset R x ~ compevmapset R x'
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
S: hSet
compevmapset R x S = compevmapset R x' S

    
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
S: hSet
compevmapset R x S ~ compevmapset R x' S
 
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
S: hSet
f: compfun R S
compevmapset R x S f = compevmapset R x' S f

    
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
S: hSet
f: ∑ F : X → S, iscomprelfun R F
compevmapset R x S f = compevmapset R x' S f

    apply (pr2 f x x' r).
  
X: UU
R: hrel X
x, x': X
r: R x x'
e1: compevmapset R x = compevmapset R x'
setquot2pr R x = setquot2pr R x'

  apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclpr1image (compevmapset R))
                           (setquot2pr R x) (setquot2pr R x') e1).
Defined.


(** *** Universal property of [seqtquot2 R] for functions to sets satisfying compatibility condition [iscomprelfun] *)

Definition setquot2univ {X : UU} (R : hrel X) (Y : hSet) (F : X -> Y)
           (is : iscomprelfun R F) (c : setquot2 R) : Y
  := pr1 c Y (make_compfun _ F is).


X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
F: X → Y
iscomp: iscomprelfun R F
x: X
setquot2univ R Y F iscomp (setquot2pr R x) = F x


X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
F: X → Y
iscomp: iscomprelfun R F
x: X
setquot2univ R Y F iscomp (setquot2pr R x) = F x

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
Y: hSet
F: X → Y
iscomp: iscomprelfun R F
x: X
setquot2univ R Y F iscomp (setquot2pr R x) = F x
 apply idpath.
Defined.

(** *** Weak equivalence from [R x x'] to [paths (setquot2pr R x) (setquot2pr R x')] *)


X: UU
R: eqrel X
x: X
iscomprelfun R (λ x' : X, R x x')

r: R x' x''

x, x', x'': X

R x x'' → R x x'

R: eqrel X
x, x', x'': X
r: R x' x''
r'': R x x''
R x x'

  apply (eqreltrans R _ _ _ r'' (eqrelsymm R _ _ r)).
Defined.

(* *** Comparison of setquot2 and setquot.  *)




X: UU
R: hrel X
is: iseqrel R
setquot R → setquot2 R


X: UU
R: hrel X
is: iseqrel R
setquot R → setquot2 R

  
X: UU
R: hrel X
is: iseqrel R
X0: setquot R
setquot2 R

  apply (setquotuniv R (make_hSet _ (isasetsetquot2 R)) (setquot2pr R)
                     (iscompsetquot2pr R) X0).
Defined.

(** ** Consequences of univalence *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.


X, Y: hSet
X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y


X, Y: hSet
X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y

  
X, Y: hSet
e: X = Y
pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
 exact (eqweqmap (maponpaths pr1hSet e)).
Defined.


X, Y: hSet
X = Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)


X, Y: hSet
X = Y ≃ (X ≃ Y)

  
X, Y: hSet
X = Y ≃ (pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y)

  
X, Y: hSet
X = Y ≃ (pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y)

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
X = Y ≃ (pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y)

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
isweq f

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
isweq f

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
isweq f

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
f = g ∘ h
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: f = g ∘ h
isweq f

  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
f = g ∘ h

    
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
e: X = Y
f e = (g ∘ h) e
 
X: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X X: X = X → pr1 X ≃ pr1 X
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 X → pr1 X ≃ pr1 X
h:= λ e : X = X, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = X → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet X
f (idpath X) = (g ∘ h) (idpath X)
 apply idpath.
  
X, Y: hSet
f:= hSet_univalence_map X Y: X = Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: f = g ∘ h
isweq f

  
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isweq (g ∘ h)
 
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isweq h
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isweq g

  
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isweq h
 
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isincl pr1hSet
 
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
∏ x : UU, isaprop (isaset x)
 exact isapropisaset.
  
X, Y: hSet
g:= eqweqmap: pr1 X = pr1 Y → pr1 X ≃ pr1 Y
h:= λ e : X = Y, maponpaths pr1hSet e: X = Y → pr1hSet X = pr1hSet Y
comp: g ∘ h = g ∘ h
isweq g
 apply univalenceAxiom.
  Unset Printing Coercions.
Defined.


X, Y: hSet
P: X ≃ Y → UU
(∏ e : X = Y, P (hSet_univalence X Y e))
→ ∏ f : X ≃ Y, P f


X, Y: hSet
P: X ≃ Y → UU
(∏ e : X = Y, P (hSet_univalence X Y e))
→ ∏ f : X ≃ Y, P f

  
X, Y: hSet
P: X ≃ Y → UU
ih: ∏ e : X = Y, P (hSet_univalence X Y e)
f: X ≃ Y
P f

  
X, Y: hSet
P: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y → UU
ih: ∏ e : X = Y, P (pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y) e)
f: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y
P f

  
X, Y: hSet
P: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y → UU
ih: ∏ e : X = Y, P (pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y) e)
f: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y
p:= ih (invmap (hSet_univalence X Y) f): P
  (pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y)
     (invmap (hSet_univalence X Y) f))
P f

  
X, Y: hSet
P: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y → UU
ih: ∏ e : X = Y, P (pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y) e)
f: pr1hSet X ≃ pr1hSet Y
p:= ih (invmap (hSet_univalence X Y) f): P
  (pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y)
     (invmap (hSet_univalence X Y) f))
h:= homotweqinvweq (hSet_univalence X Y) f: pr1weq (hSet_univalence X Y)
  (invmap (hSet_univalence X Y) f) = f
P f

  exact (transportf P h p).
  Unset Printing Coercions.
Defined.

Ltac hSet_induction f e := generalize f; apply UU_rect; intro e; clear f.

(* End of the file hSet.v *)
